src/app/api/register/route.ts
```
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { hash } from "bcryptjs";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  try {
    const body = (await req.json().catch(() => ({}))) as {
      email?: unknown;
      password?: unknown;
      name?: unknown;
    };

    const email =
      typeof body?.email === "string" ? body.email.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    const password = typeof body?.password === "string" ? body.password : "";
    const name =
      typeof body?.name === "string" && body.name.trim().length > 0
        ? body.name.trim()
        : null;

    if (!/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid email" }, { status: 400 });
    }
    if (password.length < 8) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Password must be at least 8 characters" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const existing = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { email } });
    if (existing) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Email already in use" },
        { status: 409 }
      );
    }

    const hashed = await hash(password, 10);
    const user = await prisma.user.create({
      data: { email, name, password: hashed },
      select: { id: true, email: true, name: true },
    });

    // Give every new user a default workspace so the app is
    // immediately usable after sign-up.
    const fallbackName = name || email.split("@")[0] || "My";
    await prisma.workspace.create({
      data: { name: `${fallbackName}'s Workspace`, userId: user.id },
    });

    return NextResponse.json(user, { status: 201 });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[POST /api/register]", error);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Server error" }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
```

src/app/api/workspaces/route.ts
```
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { getServerSession } from "next-auth";
import { authOptions } from "@/lib/auth";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

export async function GET(_req: NextRequest) {
  const session = await getServerSession(authOptions);
  if (!session?.user?.id) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const workspaces = await prisma.workspace.findMany({
    where: { userId: session.user.id },
    orderBy: { createdAt: "asc" },
  });

  return NextResponse.json(workspaces);
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const session = await getServerSession(authOptions);
  if (!session?.user?.id) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const body = (await req.json().catch(() => ({}))) as { name?: unknown };
  const name =
    typeof body?.name === "string" && body.name.trim().length > 0
      ? body.name.trim()
      : "New Workspace";

  const workspace = await prisma.workspace.create({
    data: { name, userId: session.user.id },
  });

  return NextResponse.json(workspace, { status: 201 });
}
```

src/app/api/workspaces/[id]/route.ts
```
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { getServerSession } from "next-auth";
import { authOptions } from "@/lib/auth";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

type Ctx = { params: { id: string } };

async function findOwnedWorkspace(id: string, userId: string) {
  return prisma.workspace.findFirst({ where: { id, userId } });
}

export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {
  const session = await getServerSession(authOptions);
  if (!session?.user?.id) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const existing = await findOwnedWorkspace(params.id, session.user.id);
  if (!existing) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  const body = (await req.json().catch(() => ({}))) as { name?: unknown };
  const data: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  if (typeof body?.name === "string" && body.name.trim().length > 0) {
    data.name = body.name.trim();
  }

  const workspace = await prisma.workspace.update({
    where: { id: params.id },
    data,
  });

  return NextResponse.json(workspace);
}

export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {
  const session = await getServerSession(authOptions);
  if (!session?.user?.id) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const existing = await findOwnedWorkspace(params.id, session.user.id);
  if (!existing) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  // Cascade removes every Document in this workspace.
  await prisma.workspace.delete({ where: { id: params.id } });

  return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
}
```

src/app/api/documents/route.ts
```
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { getServerSession } from "next-auth";
import { authOptions } from "@/lib/auth";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

async function resolveWorkspaceId(
  req: NextRequest,
  userId: string
): Promise<string | null> {
  // 1. Trust the client-supplied header (set by the workspace switcher).
  const headerId = req.headers.get("x-workspace-id");
  if (headerId) {
    const owned = await prisma.workspace.findFirst({
      where: { id: headerId, userId },
      select: { id: true },
    });
    if (owned) return owned.id;
  }
  // 2. Fall back to the user's first workspace.
  const first = await prisma.workspace.findFirst({
    where: { userId },
    orderBy: { createdAt: "asc" },
    select: { id: true },
  });
  return first?.id ?? null;
}

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const session = await getServerSession(authOptions);
    if (!session?.user?.id) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
    }

    const workspaceId = await resolveWorkspaceId(req, session.user.id);
    if (!workspaceId) {
      return NextResponse.json([]);
    }

    const documents = await prisma.document.findMany({
      where: { userId: session.user.id, workspaceId },
      orderBy: [{ position: "asc" }, { updatedAt: "desc" }],
    });

    return NextResponse.json(documents);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[GET /api/documents]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to fetch documents" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const session = await getServerSession(authOptions);
    if (!session?.user?.id) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
    }

    const workspaceId = await resolveWorkspaceId(req, session.user.id);
    if (!workspaceId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "No workspace available" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const body = (await req.json().catch(() => ({}))) as {
      title?: unknown;
      content?: unknown;
      parentDocumentId?: unknown;
      isPublished?: unknown;
      category?: unknown;
    };

    // Place the new document at the end of its siblings.
    const lastSibling = await prisma.document.findFirst({
      where: {
        userId: session.user.id,
        workspaceId,
        parentDocumentId:
          typeof body?.parentDocumentId === "string" &&
          body.parentDocumentId.length > 0
            ? body.parentDocumentId
            : null,
      },
      orderBy: { position: "desc" },
      select: { position: true },
    });
    const nextPosition = (lastSibling?.position ?? 0) + 1;

    const document = await prisma.document.create({
      data: {
        title:
          typeof body?.title === "string" && body.title.length > 0
            ? body.title
            : "Untitled",
        content: typeof body?.content === "string" ? body.content : "",
        parentDocumentId:
          typeof body?.parentDocumentId === "string" &&
          body.parentDocumentId.length > 0
            ? body.parentDocumentId
            : null,
        isPublished: Boolean(body?.isPublished),
        category:
          typeof body?.category === "string" && body.category.length > 0
            ? body.category
            : null,
        userId: session.user.id,
        workspaceId,
        position: nextPosition,
      },
    });

    return NextResponse.json(document, { status: 201 });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[POST /api/documents]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to create document" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}
```

src/app/api/documents/[id]/route.ts
```
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { getServerSession } from "next-auth";
import { authOptions } from "@/lib/auth";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

type Ctx = { params: { id: string } };

async function findOwnedDoc(id: string, userId: string) {
  return prisma.document.findFirst({ where: { id, userId } });
}

export async function GET(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {
  try {
    const session = await getServerSession(authOptions);
    if (!session?.user?.id) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
    }
    const document = await findOwnedDoc(params.id, session.user.id);
    if (!document) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
    }
    return NextResponse.json(document);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[GET /api/documents/:id]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to fetch document" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {
  try {
    const session = await getServerSession(authOptions);
    if (!session?.user?.id) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
    }
    const existing = await findOwnedDoc(params.id, session.user.id);
    if (!existing) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
    }

    const body = (await req.json().catch(() => ({}))) as Record<string, unknown>;
    const data: Record<string, unknown> = {};

    if (typeof body.title === "string") data.title = body.title;
    if (typeof body.content === "string") data.content = body.content;
    if (typeof body.isPublished === "boolean") data.isPublished = body.isPublished;
    if (body.parentDocumentId !== undefined) {
      data.parentDocumentId =
        typeof body.parentDocumentId === "string" &&
        body.parentDocumentId.length > 0
          ? body.parentDocumentId
          : null;
    }
    if (body.category !== undefined) {
      data.category =
        typeof body.category === "string" && body.category.length > 0
          ? body.category
          : null;
    }
    if (typeof body.position === "number" && Number.isFinite(body.position)) {
      data.position = body.position;
    }

    const document = await prisma.document.update({
      where: { id: params.id },
      data,
    });

    return NextResponse.json(document);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[PATCH /api/documents/:id]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to update document" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {
  try {
    const session = await getServerSession(authOptions);
    if (!session?.user?.id) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
    }
    const existing = await findOwnedDoc(params.id, session.user.id);
    if (!existing) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
    }

    await prisma.document.delete({ where: { id: params.id } });
    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[DELETE /api/documents/:id]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to delete document" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}
```

src/app/api/documents/import/route.ts
```
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { getServerSession } from "next-auth";
import { authOptions } from "@/lib/auth";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

interface IncomingDoc {
  id?: string;
  title?: string;
  content?: string;
  isPublished?: boolean;
  parentDocumentId?: string | null;
  category?: string | null;
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const session = await getServerSession(authOptions);
    if (!session?.user?.id) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
    }
    const userId = session.user.id;

    const workspaceId = await (async () => {
      const headerId = req.headers.get("x-workspace-id");
      if (headerId) {
        const owned = await prisma.workspace.findFirst({
          where: { id: headerId, userId },
          select: { id: true },
        });
        if (owned) return owned.id;
      }
      const first = await prisma.workspace.findFirst({
        where: { userId },
        orderBy: { createdAt: "asc" },
        select: { id: true },
      });
      return first?.id ?? null;
    })();

    if (!workspaceId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "No workspace available" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const body = await req.json();
    const incoming: IncomingDoc[] = Array.isArray(body)
      ? body
      : Array.isArray(body?.documents)
        ? body.documents
        : [];

    if (incoming.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "No documents to import" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    let count = 0;
    const seenIds = new Set<string>();
    let positionCursor = Date.now();

    for (const raw of incoming) {
      if (!raw || typeof raw !== "object") continue;

      const data = {
        title:
          typeof raw.title === "string" && raw.title.length > 0
            ? raw.title
            : "Untitled",
        content: typeof raw.content === "string" ? raw.content : "",
        isPublished: Boolean(raw.isPublished),
        parentDocumentId:
          typeof raw.parentDocumentId === "string" &&
          raw.parentDocumentId.length > 0
            ? raw.parentDocumentId
            : null,
        category:
          typeof raw.category === "string" && raw.category.length > 0
            ? raw.category
            : null,
        userId,
        workspaceId,
        position: positionCursor++,
      };

      const id =
        typeof raw.id === "string" && raw.id.length > 0 ? raw.id : undefined;

      if (data.parentDocumentId) {
        if (!seenIds.has(data.parentDocumentId)) {
          const parent = await prisma.document.findFirst({
            where: {
              id: data.parentDocumentId,
              userId,
              workspaceId,
            },
            select: { id: true },
          });
          if (!parent) {
            data.parentDocumentId = null;
          }
        }
      }

      if (id) {
        const existing = await prisma.document.findFirst({
          where: { id, userId },
          select: { id: true },
        });
        if (existing) {
          await prisma.document.update({ where: { id }, data });
        } else {
          await prisma.document.create({ data: { ...data, id } });
        }
        seenIds.add(id);
      } else {
        const created = await prisma.document.create({ data });
        seenIds.add(created.id);
      }
      count++;
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ count });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[POST /api/documents/import]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to import documents" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}
```

export interface Document {

  title: string;
  content: string;
  isPublished: boolean;
  category: string | null;
  userId: string;
  workspaceId: string;
  parentDocumentId: string | null;
  position: number;

}

export interface DocumentNode extends Document {

}

export interface BackupFile {
  version: 1;
  exportedAt: string;

src/lib/api.ts
```
// Active workspace is tracked on the client (localStorage) and
// forwarded to the server as a header. The server is the source
// of truth for ownership; this just lets the user switch.
const STORAGE_KEY = "active-workspace-id";

let _activeWorkspaceId: string | null = null;

function readFromStorage(): string | null {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return null;
  try {
    return window.localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

export function getActiveWorkspaceId(): string | null {
  if (_activeWorkspaceId) return _activeWorkspaceId;
  _activeWorkspaceId = readFromStorage();
  return _activeWorkspaceId;
}

export function setActiveWorkspaceId(id: string | null): void {
  _activeWorkspaceId = id;
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return;
  try {
    if (id) window.localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, id);
    else window.localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);
  } catch {
    // ignore quota / privacy errors
  }
}

export async function apiFetch(
  input: string,
  init: RequestInit = {}
): Promise<Response> {
  const headers: Record<string, string> = {
    ...(init.headers as Record<string, string> | undefined),
  };

  // Only set Content-Type for string bodies. fetch sets the
  // boundary automatically for FormData / Blob.
  if (
    init.body &&
    typeof init.body === "string" &&
    !headers["Content-Type"] &&
    !headers["content-type"]
  ) {
    headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json";
  }

  const workspaceId = getActiveWorkspaceId();
  if (workspaceId) {
    headers["x-workspace-id"] = workspaceId;
  }

  // Same-origin fetch includes cookies by default, so the
  // NextAuth session cookie is sent without any extra config.
  return fetch(input, { ...init, headers });
}

"use client";

import { ReactNode } from "react";
import { SessionProvider } from "next-auth/react";
import { ThemeProvider } from "next-themes";

export function Providers({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <SessionProvider>
      <ThemeProvider
        attribute="class"
        defaultTheme="system"
        enableSystem
        disableTransitionOnChange
      >
        {children}
      </ThemeProvider>
    </SessionProvider>
  );
}

};

}: {

src/app/login/page.tsx
```
"use client";

import { FormEvent, useState } from "react";
import { signIn } from "next-auth/react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { useRouter, useSearchParams } from "next/navigation";

export default function LoginPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const callbackUrl = searchParams.get("callbackUrl") || "/";

  const [email, setEmail] = useState("");
  const [password, setPassword] = useState("");
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  async function onSubmit(e: FormEvent) {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError(null);
    setLoading(true);

    const res = await signIn("credentials", {
      email,
      password,
      redirect: false,
      callbackUrl,
    });

    setLoading(false);

    if (!res || res.error) {
      setError("Invalid email or password");
      return;
    }

    router.push(res.url || callbackUrl);
    router.refresh();
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex min-h-screen items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 px-4 dark:bg-neutral-900">
      <div className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white p-6 shadow-sm dark:border-neutral-700 dark:bg-neutral-800">
        <h1 className="mb-1 text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-neutral-100">
          Sign in
        </h1>
        <p className="mb-6 text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-neutral-400">
          Welcome back. Please enter your details.
        </p>

        <form onSubmit={onSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-neutral-300">
              Email
            </label>
            <input
              type="email"
              required
              value={email}
              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
              className="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 outline-none focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 dark:border-neutral-600 dark:bg-neutral-900 dark:text-neutral-100"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-neutral-300">
              Password
            </label>
            <input
              type="password"
              required
              value={password}
              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
              className="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 outline-none focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 dark:border-neutral-600 dark:bg-neutral-900 dark:text-neutral-100"
            />
          </div>

          {error && (
            <p className="text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400">{error}</p>
          )}

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={loading}
            className="w-full rounded bg-blue-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            {loading ? "Signing in…" : "Sign in"}
          </button>
        </form>

        <p className="mt-4 text-center text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-neutral-400">
          Don&apos;t have an account?{" "}
          <Link
            href="/register"
            className="text-blue-600 hover:underline dark:text-blue-400"
          >
            Create one
          </Link>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/app/register/page.tsx
```
"use client";

import { FormEvent, useState } from "react";
import { signIn } from "next-auth/react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";

export default function RegisterPage() {
  const router = useRouter();

  const [name, setName] = useState("");
  const [email, setEmail] = useState("");
  const [password, setPassword] = useState("");
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  async function onSubmit(e: FormEvent) {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError(null);
    setLoading(true);

    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/register", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ name, email, password }),
      });

      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = (await res.json().catch(() => ({}))) as {
          error?: string;
        };
        setError(data.error || "Could not create account");
        setLoading(false);
        return;
      }

      const signInRes = await signIn("credentials", {
        email,
        password,
        redirect: false,
      });

      setLoading(false);

      if (!signInRes || signInRes.error) {
        setError("Account created. Please sign in.");
        router.push("/login");
        return;
      }

      router.push("/");
      router.refresh();
    } catch {
      setLoading(false);
      setError("Network error");
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex min-h-screen items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 px-4 dark:bg-neutral-900">
      <div className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white p-6 shadow-sm dark:border-neutral-700 dark:bg-neutral-800">
        <h1 className="mb-1 text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-neutral-100">
          Create account
        </h1>
        <p className="mb-6 text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-neutral-400">
          Get started with your free workspace.
        </p>

        <form onSubmit={onSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-neutral-300">
              Name
            </label>
            <input
              type="text"
              value={name}
              onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}
              className="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 outline-none focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 dark:border-neutral-600 dark:bg-neutral-900 dark:text-neutral-100"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-neutral-300">
              Email
            </label>
            <input
              type="email"
              required
              value={email}
              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
              className="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 outline-none focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 dark:border-neutral-600 dark:bg-neutral-900 dark:text-neutral-100"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-neutral-300">
              Password
            </label>
            <input
              type="password"
              required
              minLength={8}
              value={password}
              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
              className="w-full rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 outline-none focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 dark:border-neutral-600 dark:bg-neutral-900 dark:text-neutral-100"
            />
            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-neutral-500">
              At least 8 characters.
            </p>
          </div>

          {error && (
            <p className="text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400">{error}</p>
          )}

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={loading}
            className="w-full rounded bg-blue-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            {loading ? "Creating account…" : "Create account"}
          </button>
        </form>

        <p className="mt-4 text-center text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-neutral-400">
          Already have an account?{" "}
          <Link
            href="/login"
            className="text-blue-600 hover:underline dark:text-blue-400"
          >
            Sign in
          </Link>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/Editor.tsx
```
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { useEditor, EditorContent, FloatingMenu } from "@tiptap/react";
import StarterKit from "@tiptap/starter-kit";
import Placeholder from "@tiptap/extension-placeholder";
import Image from "@tiptap/extension-image";
import TaskList from "@tiptap/extension-task-list";
import TaskItem from "@tiptap/extension-task-item";
import CodeBlockLowlight from "@tiptap/extension-code-block-lowlight";
import { common, createLowlight } from "lowlight";
import {
  Bold,
  Code,
  Heading1,
  Heading2,
  Image as ImageIcon,
  Italic,
  List,
  ListOrdered,
  Quote,
  Strikethrough,
} from "lucide-react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

const lowlight = createLowlight(common);

interface Props {
  value: string;
  onChange: (html: string) => void;
  placeholder?: string;
}

export function Editor({ value, onChange, placeholder }: Props) {
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);

  const editor = useEditor({
    extensions: [
      StarterKit.configure({
        heading: { levels: [1, 2, 3] },
        // Replaced by CodeBlockLowlight below for syntax highlighting.
        codeBlock: false,
      }),
      Placeholder.configure({
        placeholder:
          placeholder ?? "Type '/' for commands, or just start writing…",
      }),
      // `inline: true` is the standard fix for "typing next to an
      // image deletes the image" — images flow inline with text
      // instead of being opaque block boundaries.
      Image.configure({
        inline: true,
        allowBase64: true,
        HTMLAttributes: {
          class: "rounded max-w-full h-auto",
        },
      }),
      TaskList,
      TaskItem.configure({ nested: true }),
      CodeBlockLowlight.configure({ lowlight }),
    ],
    content: value || "",
    immediatelyRender: false, // important for Next.js SSR
    editorProps: {
      attributes: {
        class:
          "prose prose-neutral max-w-none min-h-[calc(100vh-12rem)] px-12 py-8 outline-none focus:outline-none dark:prose-invert",
      },
    },
    onUpdate({ editor }) {
      onChange(editor.getHTML());
    },
  });

  // Keep external value changes in sync (e.g. document switch).
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!editor) return;
    if (value !== editor.getHTML()) {
      editor.commands.setContent(value || "", false);
    }
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [value, editor]);

  const handleFileSelect = (
    e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>
  ) => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file || !editor) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = () => {
      const dataUrl = reader.result;
      if (typeof dataUrl === "string") {
        editor
          .chain()
          .focus()
          .setImage({ src: dataUrl, alt: file.name })
          .run();
      }
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    e.target.value = "";
  };

  if (!editor) {
    return <div className="h-[400px] animate-pulse rounded bg-gray-50 dark:bg-neutral-800" />;
  }

  const tools: Array<{
    icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>;
    label: string;
    run: () => void;
    active: boolean;
  }> = [
    {
      icon: Heading1,
      label: "Heading 1",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 1 }).run(),
      active: editor.isActive("heading", { level: 1 }),
    },
    {
      icon: Heading2,
      label: "Heading 2",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 2 }).run(),
      active: editor.isActive("heading", { level: 2 }),
    },
    {
      icon: Bold,
      label: "Bold",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBold().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("bold"),
    },
    {
      icon: Italic,
      label: "Italic",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleItalic().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("italic"),
    },
    {
      icon: Strikethrough,
      label: "Strike",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleStrike().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("strike"),
    },
    {
      icon: Code,
      label: "Inline code",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleCode().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("code"),
    },
    {
      icon: List,
      label: "Bulleted list",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBulletList().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("bulletList"),
    },
    {
      icon: ListOrdered,
      label: "Numbered list",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleOrderedList().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("orderedList"),
    },
    {
      icon: Quote,
      label: "Quote",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBlockquote().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("blockquote"),
    },
    {
      icon: ImageIcon,
      label: "Insert image",
      run: () => fileInputRef.current?.click(),
      active: false,
    },
  ];

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="sticky top-0 z-10 mb-2 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-0.5 rounded-md border border-gray-200 bg-white/80 p-1 backdrop-blur dark:border-neutral-700 dark:bg-neutral-900/80">
        {tools.map((t) => (
          <button
            key={t.label}
            type="button"
            onClick={t.run}
            title={t.label}
            className={cn(
              "rounded p-1.5 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-300 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800",
              t.active && "bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 dark:bg-neutral-800 dark:text-neutral-50"
            )}
          >
            <t.icon className="h-4 w-4" />
          </button>
        ))}
        <input
          ref={fileInputRef}
          type="file"
          accept="image/*"
          className="hidden"
          onChange={handleFileSelect}
        />
      </div>

      <EditorContent editor={editor} />

      <FloatingMenu
        editor={editor}
        tippyOptions={{ placement: "left", duration: 100 }}
        shouldShow={({ editor, from }) => {
          if (!editor.isFocused) return false;
          // Show only when the current line is empty.
          const $from = editor.state.doc.resolve(from);
          return $from.parent.textContent.length === 0;
        }}
        className="flex flex-col gap-1 rounded-md border border-gray-200 bg-white p-1 shadow-md dark:border-neutral-700 dark:bg-neutral-800"
      >
        <button
          onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 1 }).run()}
          className="rounded px-2 py-1 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700"
        >
          H1 Heading
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 2 }).run()}
          className="rounded px-2 py-1 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700"
        >
          H2 Heading
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 3 }).run()}
          className="rounded px-2 py-1 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700"
        >
          H3 Heading
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleBulletList().run()}
          className="rounded px-2 py-1 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700"
        >
          • Bullet list
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleOrderedList().run()}
          className="rounded px-2 py-1 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700"
        >
          1. Numbered list
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleTaskList().run()}
          className="rounded px-2 py-1 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700"
        >
          ☑ Task list
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleCodeBlock().run()}
          className="rounded px-2 py-1 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700"
        >
          {"</>"} Code block
        </button>
      </FloatingMenu>
    </div>
  );
}

import { FileText, Plus } from "lucide-react";

interface Props {
  onCreate: () => void;
}

export function EmptyState({ onCreate }: Props) {
  return (
    <div className="flex h-full flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 text-center text-gray-400 dark:text-neutral-500">
      <FileText className="mb-4 h-12 w-12" />
      <h2 className="mb-1 text-lg font-semibold text-gray-700 dark:text-neutral-200">
        No page selected
      </h2>
      <p className="mb-5 max-w-sm text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-neutral-400">
        Pick a page from the sidebar, or create a new one to get started.
      </p>

        onClick={onCreate}
        className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded bg-blue-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700"
      >
        <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
        New page
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

src/components/DocumentEditor.tsx
```
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { Tag, Trash2 } from "lucide-react";
import { useDebounce } from "@/hooks/useDebounce";
import { apiFetch } from "@/lib/api";
import type { Document } from "@/lib/types";
import { Editor } from "./Editor";

interface Props {
  document: Document;
  onSaved: () => void;
  onDeleted: () => void;
}

type SaveStatus = "saved" | "saving" | "unsaved" | "error";

export function DocumentEditor({
  document: doc,
  onSaved,
  onDeleted,
}: Props) {
  const [title, setTitle] = useState(doc.title);
  const [content, setContent] = useState(doc.content);
  const [category, setCategory] = useState(doc.category ?? "");
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<SaveStatus>("saved");
  const lastSaved = useRef({
    title: doc.title,
    content: doc.content,
    category: doc.category ?? "",
  });

  // Re-seed local state when the user switches to a different doc.
  useEffect(() => {
    setTitle(doc.title);
    setContent(doc.content);
    setCategory(doc.category ?? "");
    lastSaved.current = {
      title: doc.title,
      content: doc.content,
      category: doc.category ?? "",
    };
    setStatus("saved");
  }, [doc.id, doc.title, doc.content, doc.category]);

  const debouncedTitle = useDebounce(title, 600);
  const debouncedContent = useDebounce(content, 600);
  const debouncedCategory = useDebounce(category, 600);

  useEffect(() => {
    const titleChanged = debouncedTitle !== lastSaved.current.title;
    const contentChanged = debouncedContent !== lastSaved.current.content;
    const categoryChanged = debouncedCategory !== lastSaved.current.category;
    if (!titleChanged && !contentChanged && !categoryChanged) return;

    let cancelled = false;
    setStatus("saving");

    (async () => {
      try {
        const body: Record<string, unknown> = {};
        if (titleChanged) body.title = debouncedTitle;
        if (contentChanged) body.content = debouncedContent;
        if (categoryChanged) body.category = debouncedCategory || null;

        const res = await apiFetch(`/api/documents/${doc.id}`, {
          method: "PATCH",
          body: JSON.stringify(body),
        });
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
        if (cancelled) return;

        lastSaved.current = {
          title: debouncedTitle,
          content: debouncedContent,
          category: debouncedCategory,
        };
        setStatus("saved");
        onSaved();
      } catch (e) {
        if (cancelled) return;
        console.error("Save failed", e);
        setStatus("error");
      }
    })();

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [debouncedTitle, debouncedContent, debouncedCategory, doc.id, onSaved]);

  const remove = async () => {
    if (!confirm(`Delete "${title || "Untitled"}"?`)) return;
    try {
      await apiFetch(`/api/documents/${doc.id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
      onDeleted();
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Delete failed", e);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-full flex-col">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-200 px-12 py-2 dark:border-neutral-800">
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-neutral-500">
          {status === "saving" && "Saving…"}
          {status === "saved" && "Saved"}
          {status === "unsaved" && "Unsaved"}
          {status === "error" && (
            <span className="text-red-500">Save failed — will retry</span>
          )}
        </span>
        <button
          onClick={remove}
          className="rounded p-1.5 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-red-500 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800"
          title="Delete page"
        >
          <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4" />
        </button>
      </div>

      <input
        value={title}
        onChange={(e) => {
          setTitle(e.target.value);
          setStatus("unsaved");
        }}
        placeholder="Untitled"
        className="mx-12 mb-2 mt-2 bg-transparent text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 outline-none placeholder:text-gray-300 dark:text-neutral-100 dark:placeholder:text-neutral-700"
      />

      <div className="mx-12 mb-3 flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-700 dark:text-neutral-300">
        <Tag className="h-3.5 w-3.5 shrink-0" />
        <input
          value={category}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setCategory(e.target.value);
            setStatus("unsaved");
          }}
          placeholder="Add a category (e.g. Work, Personal)"
          className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-sm text-gray-700 outline-none placeholder:text-gray-400 dark:text-neutral-300 dark:placeholder:text-neutral-600"
        />
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
        <Editor
          value={content}
          onChange={(v) => {
            setContent(v);
            setStatus("unsaved");
          }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

src/components/DocumentTree.tsx
```
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import {
  ChevronDown,
  ChevronRight,
  FileText,
  GripVertical,
  MoreHorizontal,
  Plus,
} from "lucide-react";
import {
  DragDropContext,
  Draggable,
  Droppable,
  type DropResult,
} from "@hello-pangea/dnd";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import type { Document, DocumentNode } from "@/lib/types";

interface Props {
  documents: Document[];
  selectedId: string | null;
  onSelect: (id: string) => void;
  onCreate: (parentId: string | null) => void;
  onReorder: (docId: string, newCategory: string | null, newIndex: number) => void;
  onChanged: () => void;
}

interface NodeProps {
  node: DocumentNode;
  depth: number;
  selectedId: string | null;
  onSelect: (id: string) => void;
  onCreate: (parentId: string | null) => void;
  onDelete: (id: string) => void;
}

function TreeNode({
  node,
  depth,
  selectedId,
  onSelect,
  onCreate,
  onDelete,
}: NodeProps) {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(true);
  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const hasChildren = node.children.length > 0;

  return (
    <li>
      <div
        className={cn(
          "group relative flex items-center gap-1 rounded px-1 py-1 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800",
          selectedId === node.id && "bg-gray-200 font-medium text-gray-900 dark:bg-neutral-700 dark:text-neutral-50"
        )}
        style={{ paddingLeft: depth * 12 + 4 }}
      >
        <button
          onClick={() => setOpen((v) => !v)}
          className="flex h-4 w-4 items-center justify-center text-gray-500"
          aria-label={open ? "Collapse" : "Expand"}
        >
          {hasChildren ? (
            open ? (
              <ChevronDown className="h-3 w-3" />
            ) : (
              <ChevronRight className="h-3 w-3" />
            )
          ) : (
            <span className="block h-3 w-3" />
          )}
        </button>

        <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5 shrink-0 text-gray-500" />

        <button
          onClick={() => onSelect(node.id)}
          className="flex flex-1 items-center gap-1.5 truncate text-left"
        >
          <span className="truncate">{node.title || "Untitled"}</span>
        </button>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100">
          <button
            onClick={() => onCreate(node.id)}
            className="rounded p-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-300 dark:hover:bg-neutral-600"
            title="Add sub-page"
          >
            <Plus className="h-3 w-3" />
          </button>
          <div className="relative">
            <button
              onClick={() => setMenuOpen((v) => !v)}
              className="rounded p-0.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-300 dark:hover:bg-neutral-600"
              title="More"
            >
              <MoreHorizontal className="h-3 w-3" />
            </button>
            {menuOpen && (
              <div
                className="absolute right-0 z-20 mt-1 w-36 rounded-md border border-gray-200 bg-white py-1 text-xs shadow-lg dark:border-neutral-700 dark:bg-neutral-800"
                onMouseLeave={() => setMenuOpen(false)}
              >
                <button
                  onClick={() => {
                    setMenuOpen(false);
                    onCreate(node.id);
                  }}
                  className="flex w-full items-center gap-2 px-2 py-1.5 text-left text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700"
                >
                  <Plus className="h-3 w-3" /> Add sub-page
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={async () => {
                    setMenuOpen(false);
                    if (!confirm("Delete this page?")) return;
                    await fetch(`/api/documents/${node.id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
                    onDelete(node.id);
                  }}
                  className="flex w-full items-center gap-2 px-2 py-1.5 text-left text-red-600 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-red-400 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700"
                >
                  Delete
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {open && hasChildren && (
        <ul>
          {node.children
            .slice()
            .sort((a, b) => a.position - b.position)
            .map((child) => (
              <TreeNode
                key={child.id}
                node={child}
                depth={depth + 1}
                selectedId={selectedId}
                onSelect={onSelect}
                onCreate={onCreate}
                onDelete={onDelete}
              />
            ))}
        </ul>
      )}
    </li>
  );
}

const UNCATEGORIZED = "Uncategorized";

export function DocumentTree({
  documents,
  selectedId,
  onSelect,
  onCreate,
  onReorder,
  onChanged,
}: Props) {
  // Build a tree from the flat list, then group top-level nodes
  // by category for drag-and-drop. Sub-pages stay nested under
  // their parent regardless of the child's own category.
  const topLevel: Document[] = documents
    .filter((d) => !d.parentDocumentId)
    .slice()
    .sort((a, b) => a.position - b.position);

  const groups = new Map<string, Document[]>();
  topLevel.forEach((doc) => {
    const key = doc.category ?? UNCATEGORIZED;
    if (!groups.has(key)) groups.set(key, []);
    groups.get(key)!.push(doc);
  });

  const sortedCategories = Array.from(groups.keys()).sort((a, b) => {
    if (a === UNCATEGORIZED) return 1;
    if (b === UNCATEGORIZED) return -1;
    return a.localeCompare(b);
  });

  const handleDragEnd = (result: DropResult) => {
    if (!result.destination) return;
    const { draggableId, source, destination } = result;
    if (
      source.droppableId === destination.droppableId &&
      source.index === destination.index
    ) {
      return;
    }
    const docId = draggableId.replace(/^doc:/, "");
    const newCategory =
      destination.droppableId === "uncategorized"
        ? null
        : destination.droppableId;
    onReorder(docId, newCategory, destination.index);
  };

  function handleDelete(_id: string) {
    onChanged();
  }

  const childrenByParent = new Map<string, Document[]>();
  documents.forEach((d) => {
    if (d.parentDocumentId) {
      const arr = childrenByParent.get(d.parentDocumentId) ?? [];
      arr.push(d);
      childrenByParent.set(d.parentDocumentId, arr);
    }
  });

  function buildSubTree(rootId: string, depth: number): React.ReactNode {
    const kids = (childrenByParent.get(rootId) ?? [])
      .slice()
      .sort((a, b) => a.position - b.position);
    if (kids.length === 0) return null;
    return (
      <ul>
        {kids.map((child) => {
          const node: DocumentNode = { ...child, children: [] };
          return (
            <TreeNode
              key={child.id}
              node={node}
              depth={depth}
              selectedId={selectedId}
              onSelect={onSelect}
              onCreate={onCreate}
              onDelete={handleDelete}
            />
          );
        })}
      </ul>
    );
  }

  if (topLevel.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="px-3 py-2 text-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-neutral-500">
        No pages yet
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <DragDropContext onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}>
      <div className="space-y-2">
        {sortedCategories.map((category) => {
          const items = groups.get(category)!;
          const droppableId = category === UNCATEGORIZED ? "uncategorized" : category;
          return (
            <div key={category}>
              <div className="px-2 py-1 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 dark:text-neutral-500">
                {category}
              </div>
              <Droppable droppableId={droppableId}>
                {(provided) => (
                  <div
                    ref={provided.innerRef}
                    {...provided.droppableProps}
                    className="min-h-[6px] space-y-0.5"
                  >
                    {items.map((doc, index) => (
                      <div key={doc.id}>
                        <Draggable draggableId={`doc:${doc.id}`} index={index}>
                          {(p) => (
                            <div
                              ref={p.innerRef}
                              {...p.draggableProps}
                              className="group flex items-center gap-1 rounded px-1 py-1 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800"
                            >
                              <span
                                {...p.dragHandleProps}
                                className="cursor-grab text-gray-300 active:cursor-grabbing dark:text-neutral-600"
                                title="Drag"
                              >
                                <GripVertical className="h-3 w-3" />
                              </span>
                              <button
                                onClick={() => onSelect(doc.id)}
                                className={cn(
                                  "flex flex-1 items-center gap-1.5 truncate text-left",
                                  selectedId === doc.id && "font-medium text-gray-900 dark:text-neutral-50"
                                )}
                              >
                                <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5 shrink-0 text-gray-500" />
                                <span className="truncate">
                                  {doc.title || "Untitled"}
                                </span>
                                {doc.category && (
                                  <span className="ml-1 shrink-0 rounded bg-gray-200 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] text-gray-600 dark:bg-neutral-700 dark:text-neutral-300">
                                    {doc.category}
                                  </span>
                                )}
                              </button>
                              <button
                                onClick={() => onCreate(doc.id)}
                                className="rounded p-0.5 text-gray-500 opacity-0 hover:bg-gray-300 group-hover:opacity-100 dark:hover:bg-neutral-600"
                                title="Add sub-page"
                              >
                                <Plus className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                              </button>
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </Draggable>
                        {buildSubTree(doc.id, 1)}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                    {provided.placeholder}
                  </div>
                )}
              </Droppable>
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </DragDropContext>
  );
}
```

src/components/Sidebar.tsx
```
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import {
  ChevronDown,
  Download,
  FileText,
  LogIn,
  LogOut,
  Moon,
  PanelLeftClose,
  PanelLeftOpen,
  Plus,
  Sun,
  Upload,
} from "lucide-react";
import { signIn, signOut, useSession } from "next-auth/react";
import { useTheme } from "next-themes";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { exportBackup, importBackup } from "@/lib/backup";
import { apiFetch, setActiveWorkspaceId } from "@/lib/api";
import { DocumentTree } from "./DocumentTree";
import type { Document, Workspace } from "@/lib/types";

interface Props {
  documents: Document[];
  selectedId: string | null;
  onSelect: (id: string) => void;
  onCreate: (parentId: string | null) => void;
  isOpen: boolean;
  onToggle: () => void;
  onChanged: () => void;
  workspaces: Workspace[];
  activeWorkspaceId: string | null;
  onSwitchWorkspace: (id: string) => void;
  onCreateWorkspace: () => void;
}

export function Sidebar({
  documents,
  selectedId,
  onSelect,
  onCreate,
  isOpen,
  onToggle,
  onChanged,
  workspaces,
  activeWorkspaceId,
  onSwitchWorkspace,
  onCreateWorkspace,
}: Props) {
  const { data: session } = useSession();
  const { theme, setTheme } = useTheme();
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
  const [wsMenuOpen, setWsMenuOpen] = useState(false);

  const activeWorkspace =
    workspaces.find((w) => w.id === activeWorkspaceId) ?? workspaces[0] ?? null;

  // Keep the api header in sync with the active workspace.
  useEffect(() => {
    setActiveWorkspaceId(activeWorkspaceId);
  }, [activeWorkspaceId]);

  async function handleReorder(
    docId: string,
    newCategory: string | null,
    _newIndex: number
  ) {
    try {
      await apiFetch(`/api/documents/${docId}`, {
        method: "PATCH",
        body: JSON.stringify({ category: newCategory }),
      });
      onChanged();
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Reorder failed", e);
    }
  }

  return (
    <aside
      className={cn(
        "flex h-full shrink-0 flex-col border-r border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 transition-[width] duration-200 dark:border-neutral-800 dark:bg-neutral-900",
        isOpen ? "w-72" : "w-12"
      )}
    >
      {/* Top: collapse button + workspace switcher */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 border-b border-gray-200 p-2 dark:border-neutral-800">
        <button
          onClick={onToggle}
          className="rounded p-1.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:text-neutral-400 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800"
          title={isOpen ? "Collapse sidebar" : "Expand sidebar"}
        >
          {isOpen ? (
            <PanelLeftClose className="h-4 w-4" />
          ) : (
            <PanelLeftOpen className="h-4 w-4" />
          )}
        </button>

        {isOpen && (
          <div className="relative flex-1">
            <button
              onClick={() => setWsMenuOpen((v) => !v)}
              className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-1 rounded px-2 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:text-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800"
            >
              <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 truncate">
                <FileText className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                <span className="truncate">
                  {activeWorkspace?.name ?? "No workspace"}
                </span>
              </span>
              <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5 shrink-0" />
            </button>

            {wsMenuOpen && (
              <div
                className="absolute left-0 right-0 z-20 mt-1 rounded border border-gray-200 bg-white py-1 text-sm shadow-md dark:border-neutral-700 dark:bg-neutral-800"
                onMouseLeave={() => setWsMenuOpen(false)}
              >
                {workspaces.map((w) => (
                  <button
                    key={w.id}
                    onClick={() => {
                      setWsMenuOpen(false);
                      onSwitchWorkspace(w.id);
                    }}
                    className={cn(
                      "block w-full px-3 py-1.5 text-left hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700",
                      w.id === activeWorkspaceId
                        ? "font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-neutral-50"
                        : "text-gray-700 dark:text-neutral-200"
                    )}
                  >
                    {w.name}
                  </button>
                ))}
                <div className="my-1 border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-neutral-700" />
                <button
                  onClick={() => {
                    setWsMenuOpen(false);
                    onCreateWorkspace();
                  }}
                  className="flex w-full items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-left text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:text-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700"
                >
                  <Plus className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                  New workspace
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Middle: new page + tree + import/export */}
      {isOpen && (
        <>
          <div className="space-y-1 p-2">
            <button
              onClick={() => onCreate(null)}
              className="flex w-full items-center gap-2 rounded px-2 py-1.5 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:text-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800"
            >
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
              <span>New page</span>
            </button>
            <div className="flex gap-1">
              <button
                onClick={async () => {
                  try {
                    await exportBackup();
                  } catch (err) {
                    console.error(err);
                    alert("Failed to export backup.");
                  }
                }}
                className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded py-1 text-xs text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:text-neutral-400 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800"
                title="Export"
              >
                <Download className="h-3 w-3" /> Export
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
                className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded py-1 text-xs text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:text-neutral-400 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800"
                title="Import"
              >
                <Upload className="h-3 w-3" /> Import
              </button>
              <input
                ref={fileInputRef}
                type="file"
                accept="application/json,.json"
                className="hidden"
                onChange={async (e) => {
                  const file = e.target.files?.[0];
                  if (!file) return;
                  try {
                    const count = await importBackup(file);
                    onChanged();
                    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("documents:changed"));
                    alert(`Imported ${count} page${count === 1 ? "" : "s"}.`);
                  } catch (err) {
                    console.error(err);
                    alert(
                      err instanceof Error
                        ? err.message
                        : "Failed to import backup."
                    );
                  } finally {
                    e.target.value = "";
                  }
                }}
              />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-1 pb-2">
            <DocumentTree
              documents={documents}
              selectedId={selectedId}
              onSelect={onSelect}
              onCreate={onCreate}
              onReorder={handleReorder}
              onChanged={onChanged}
            />
          </div>
        </>
      )}

      {/* Bottom: theme toggle + user */}
      {isOpen && (
        <div className="mt-auto space-y-1 border-t border-gray-200 p-2 dark:border-neutral-800">
          <button
            onClick={() => setTheme(theme === "dark" ? "light" : "dark")}
            className="flex w-full items-center gap-2 rounded px-2 py-1.5 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:text-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800"
            title="Toggle theme"
          >
            {theme === "dark" ? (
              <>
                <Sun className="h-4 w-4" /> Light mode
              </>
            ) : (
              <>
                <Moon className="h-4 w-4" /> Dark mode
              </>
            )}
          </button>

          {session?.user ? (
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 rounded px-2 py-1.5 text-sm">
              <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                <div className="truncate font-medium text-gray-900 dark:text-neutral-100">
                  {session.user.name || session.user.email}
                </div>
                {session.user.name && (
                  <div className="truncate text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-neutral-400">
                    {session.user.email}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
              <button
                onClick={() => signOut({ callbackUrl: "/login" })}
                className="rounded p-1.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:text-neutral-400 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800"
                title="Sign out"
              >
                <LogOut className="h-4 w-4" />
              </button>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <button
              onClick={() => signIn()}
              className="flex w-full items-center gap-2 rounded bg-blue-600 px-2 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700"
            >
              <LogIn className="h-4 w-4" />
              Sign in
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </aside>
  );
}
```

src/components/AppShell.tsx
```
"use client";

import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { useSession } from "next-auth/react";
import { Sidebar } from "./Sidebar";
import { DocumentEditor } from "./DocumentEditor";
import { EmptyState } from "./EmptyState";
import type { Document, Workspace } from "@/lib/types";
import { apiFetch, getActiveWorkspaceId, setActiveWorkspaceId } from "@/lib/api";

export function AppShell() {
  const { data: session, status } = useSession();

  const [documents, setDocuments] = useState<Document[]>([]);
  const [workspaces, setWorkspaces] = useState<Workspace[]>([]);
  const [activeWorkspaceId, setActiveWorkspace] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(true);
  const [dataLoading, setDataLoading] = useState(false);

  const refreshDocuments = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setDataLoading(true);
      const res = await apiFetch("/api/documents", { cache: "no-store" });
      if (!res.ok) {
        setDocuments([]);
        return;
      }
      const data = (await res.json()) as Document[];
      setDocuments(data);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Failed to load documents", e);
    } finally {
      setDataLoading(false);
    }
  }, []);

  const refreshWorkspaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const res = await apiFetch("/api/workspaces", { cache: "no-store" });
      if (!res.ok) {
        setWorkspaces([]);
        return;
      }
      const data = (await res.json()) as Workspace[];
      setWorkspaces(data);
      setActiveWorkspace((current) => {
        if (current && data.some((w) => w.id === current)) return current;
        const stored = getActiveWorkspaceId();
        if (stored && data.some((w) => w.id === stored)) return stored;
        return data[0]?.id ?? null;
      });
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Failed to load workspaces", e);
    }
  }, []);

  // Load workspaces + documents whenever the auth state flips to "logged in".
  useEffect(() => {
    if (status !== "authenticated") return;
    refreshWorkspaces().then(refreshDocuments);
  }, [status, refreshWorkspaces, refreshDocuments]);

  // Refetch documents whenever the active workspace changes.
  useEffect(() => {
    if (status === "authenticated" && activeWorkspaceId) {
      refreshDocuments();
    }
  }, [activeWorkspaceId, status, refreshDocuments]);

  async function createDocument(parentId: string | null) {
    try {
      const res = await apiFetch("/api/documents", {
        method: "POST",
        body: JSON.stringify({
          title: "Untitled",
          content: "",
          parentDocumentId: parentId,
        }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) return;
      const doc = (await res.json()) as Document;
      await refreshDocuments();
      setSelectedId(doc.id);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Create failed", e);
    }
  }

  async function createWorkspace() {
    const name = window.prompt("Workspace name", "New Workspace");
    if (!name) return;
    try {
      const res = await apiFetch("/api/workspaces", {
        method: "POST",
        body: JSON.stringify({ name }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) return;
      const ws = (await res.json()) as Workspace;
      setWorkspaces((prev) => [...prev, ws]);
      setActiveWorkspace(ws.id);
      setActiveWorkspaceId(ws.id);
      setSelectedId(null);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Create workspace failed", e);
    }
  }

  const switchWorkspace = useCallback((id: string) => {
    setActiveWorkspace(id);
    setActiveWorkspaceId(id);
    setSelectedId(null);
  }, []);

  // --- Render gates -------------------------------------------------------

  if (status === "loading") {
    return (
      <div className="flex h-screen items-center justify-center bg-white text-gray-500 dark:bg-neutral-900 dark:text-neutral-400">
        Loading…
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!session) {
    return (
      <div className="flex h-screen items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 dark:bg-neutral-900">
        <div className="max-w-sm rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white p-8 text-center shadow-sm dark:border-neutral-700 dark:bg-neutral-800">
          <h1 className="mb-2 text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-neutral-100">
            Welcome to your Notion Clone
          </h1>
          <p className="mb-6 text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-neutral-400">
            Sign in to access your workspaces and pages.
          </p>
          <Link
            href="/login"
            className="block w-full rounded bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700"
          >
            Sign in
          </Link>
          <p className="mt-3 text-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-neutral-500">
            New here?{" "}
            <Link
              href="/register"
              className="text-blue-600 hover:underline dark:text-blue-400"
            >
              Create an account
            </Link>
            .
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // --- Authenticated shell -----------------------------------------------

  const selectedDoc = documents.find((d) => d.id === selectedId) ?? null;

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen overflow-hidden bg-white text-gray-900 dark:bg-neutral-900 dark:text-neutral-100">
      <Sidebar
        documents={documents}
        selectedId={selectedId}
        onSelect={setSelectedId}
        onCreate={createDocument}
        isOpen={isOpen}
        onToggle={() => setIsOpen((v) => !v)}
        onChanged={refreshDocuments}
        workspaces={workspaces}
        activeWorkspaceId={activeWorkspaceId}
        onSwitchWorkspace={switchWorkspace}
        onCreateWorkspace={createWorkspace}
      />
      <main className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
        {dataLoading && documents.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex h-full items-center justify-center text-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-neutral-500">
            Loading…
          </div>
        ) : selectedDoc ? (
          <DocumentEditor
            key={selectedDoc.id}
            document={selectedDoc}
            onSaved={refreshDocuments}
            onDeleted={() => {
              setSelectedId(null);
              refreshDocuments();
            }}
          />
        ) : (
          <EmptyState onCreate={() => createDocument(null)} />
        )}
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

### Install (run in a separate terminal first)

```
npm install next-auth@^4 @next-auth/prisma-adapter bcryptjs \
  @tiptap/extension-task-list @tiptap/extension-task-item \
  @tiptap/extension-code-block-lowlight lowlight \
  next-themes @hello-pangea/dnd \
  @tailwindcss/typography
npm install -D @types/bcryptjs
```

Add to `.env` (then restart the dev server):

```
NEXTAUTH_SECRET=            # run: openssl rand -base64 32
NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000
```

### Apply the schema migration

```
npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
npx prisma generate
```

(If you're on SQLite, use `--force-reset` instead. The old "anonymous" documents are unrecoverable either way because the FK shape changes — `sessionId` becomes `userId`, and `Document` now requires a `workspaceId`.)

### Smoke-test in this order

1. `/register` → create an account → land on `/` with a default workspace already in the sidebar.
2. Theme button at the bottom of the sidebar → whole UI flips to dark.
3. Workspace dropdown at the top of the sidebar → create a second workspace → switch between them — documents reload per workspace.
4. Drag a top-level page from one category to another → its category persists after refresh.
5. In a page, insert an image via the toolbar and type next to it → the image should no longer disappear.
6. On an empty line in the editor, the floating menu should offer H1/H2/H3, bullet/numbered/task lists, and a code block.

### Known things to double-check after install

- `import { PrismaAdapter } from "@next-auth/prisma-adapter"` requires the `@next-auth/prisma-adapter` peer dep. If you also want OAuth providers later, you can drop the `PrismaAdapter` line — JWT sessions don't need it.
- The `lowlight` package needs to be installed alongside `@tiptap/extension-code-block-lowlight`; I included it in the install command.
- `@tailwindcss/typography` was added so the `prose` classes in the editor render correctly. If you don't want to add it, remove the `import typography from "@tailwindcss/typography"` line in `tailwind.config.ts` and the `prose` classes will still work but unstyled.
- The `Document.id` field changed from `uuid()` to `cuid()`. If your old data had explicit `uuid` IDs you depended on, that's now gone — but the migration flags this for you.

Let me know if anything breaks on first run and I'll patch it.

next-auth.d.ts
```
import "next-auth";
import "next-auth/jwt";

declare module "next-auth" {
  interface Session {
    user: {
      id: string;
      name?: string | null;
      email?: string | null;
      image?: string | null;
    };
  }

  interface User {
    id: string;
  }
}

declare module "next-auth/jwt" {
  interface JWT {
    uid?: string;
  }
}
```

prisma/schema.prisma
```
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// =====================================================
// NextAuth (Credentials provider with bcryptjs)
// =====================================================

model User {
  id            String    @id @default(cuid())
  name          String?
  email         String    @unique
  emailVerified DateTime?
  image         String?
  password      String?
  accounts      Account[]
  sessions      Session[]
  documents     Document[]
  workspaces    Workspace[]
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt
}

model Account {
  id                String  @id @default(cuid())
  userId            String
  type              String
  provider          String
  providerAccountId String
  refresh_token     String?
  access_token      String?
  expires_at        Int?
  token_type        String?
  scope             String?
  id_token          String?
  session_state     String?
  user              User    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([provider, providerAccountId])
}

model Session {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  sessionToken String   @unique
  userId       String
  expires      DateTime
  user         User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

model VerificationToken {
  identifier String
  token      String   @unique
  expires    DateTime

  @@unique([identifier, token])
}

// =====================================================
// Application
// =====================================================

model Workspace {
  id        String     @id @default(cuid())
  name      String
  userId    String
  user      User       @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  documents Document[]
  createdAt DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime   @updatedAt

  @@index([userId])
}

model Document {
  id               String      @id @default(cuid())
  title            String      @default("Untitled")
  content          String      @default("")
  isPublished      Boolean     @default(false)
  category         String?
  userId           String
  user             User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  workspaceId      String
  workspace        Workspace   @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  parentDocumentId String?
  parentDocument   Document?   @relation("DocumentHierarchy", fields: [parentDocumentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  childDocuments   Document[]  @relation("DocumentHierarchy")
  position         Float       @default(0)
  createdAt        DateTime    @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime    @updatedAt

  @@index([parentDocumentId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([workspaceId])
  @@index([category])
}
```

src/lib/auth.ts
```
import { PrismaAdapter } from "@next-auth/prisma-adapter";
import type { NextAuthOptions } from "next-auth";
import CredentialsProvider from "next-auth/providers/credentials";
import { compare } from "bcryptjs";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {
  adapter: PrismaAdapter(prisma),
  session: { strategy: "jwt" },
  pages: { signIn: "/login" },
  providers: [
    CredentialsProvider({
      name: "Credentials",
      credentials: {
        email: { label: "Email", type: "email" },
        password: { label: "Password", type: "password" },
      },
      async authorize(credentials) {
        if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) return null;
        const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
          where: { email: credentials.email.toLowerCase().trim() },
        });
        if (!user || !user.password) return null;
        const ok = await compare(credentials.password, user.password);
        if (!ok) return null;
        return { id: user.id, email: user.email, name: user.name };
      },
    }),
  ],
  callbacks: {
    async jwt({ token, user }) {
      if (user) {
        token.uid = (user as { id: string }).id;
      }
      return token;
    },
    async session({ session, token }) {
      if (session.user && token.uid) {
        (session.user as { id?: string }).id = token.uid as string;
      }
      return session;
    },
  },
};
```

src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
