Actually, I'll write a minimal version that uses the prosemirror state directly:

```tsx
const checkSlashCommand = useCallback(() => {
  if (!editor) return;
  const { state } = editor;
  const { selection } = state;
  const { $from } = selection;
  const parent = $from.parent;
  
  // Only show in paragraphs
  if (parent.type.name !== "paragraph") {
    setSlashOpen(false);
    return;
  }
  
  const text = parent.textContent;
  
  // Show if text is empty (about to type /) or is just "/"
  if (text === "" || text === "/") {
    try {
      const coords = editor.view.coordsAtPos($from.pos);
      const rect = {
        left: coords.left,
        top: coords.bottom + 4,
        bottom: coords.bottom,
        right: coords.right,
        width: 0,
        height: coords.bottom - coords.top,
        x: coords.left,
        y: coords.bottom,
        toJSON: () => ({}),
      } as DOMRect;
      setSlashRect(rect);
      setSlashOpen(true);
      setSlashIndex(0);
    } catch {
      setSlashOpen(false);
    }
  } else {
    setSlashOpen(false);
  }
}, [editor]);

useEffect(() => {
  if (!editor) return;
  editor.on("update", checkSlashCommand);
  editor.on("selectionUpdate", checkSlashCommand);
  return () => {
    editor.off("update", checkSlashCommand);
    editor.off("selectionUpdate", checkSlashCommand);
  };
}, [editor, checkSlashCommand]);
```

OK let me just write it all out now. I'll be concise but complete.

For the slash menu options:
1. Heading 1 → `editor.chain().focus().deleteRange(currentRange).setNode("heading", { level: 1 }).run()`
2. Heading 2 → same with level 2
3. Bullet List → `editor.chain().focus().deleteRange(currentRange).toggleBulletList().run()`

The "deleteRange" removes the `/` character before transforming the node.

Let me also handle keyboard:
- ArrowDown/ArrowUp to navigate
- Enter to select
- Escape to close

Let me write the full Editor.tsx now.

```tsx
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef, useState, useCallback } from "react";
import { useEditor, EditorContent } from "@tiptap/react";
import StarterKit from "@tiptap/starter-kit";
import Placeholder from "@tiptap/extension-placeholder";
import Image from "@tiptap/extension-image";
import {
  Bold,
  Code,
  Heading1,
  Heading2,
  Image as ImageIcon,
  Italic,
  List,
  ListOrdered,
  Quote,
  Strikethrough,
} from "lucide-react";
import { cn } from "../lib/utils";

interface Props {
  value: string;
  onChange: (html: string) => void;
}

const SLASH_COMMANDS = [
  {
    label: "Heading 1",
    description: "Large section heading",
    icon: Heading1,
    run: (editor: any, range: any) => {
      editor
        .chain()
        .focus()
        .deleteRange(range)
        .setNode("heading", { level: 1 })
        .run();
    },
  },
  {
    label: "Heading 2",
    description: "Medium section heading",
    icon: Heading2,
    run: (editor: any, range: any) => {
      editor
        .chain()
        .focus()
        .deleteRange(range)
        .setNode("heading", { level: 2 })
        .run();
    },
  },
  {
    label: "Bullet List",
    description: "Simple bulleted list",
    icon: List,
    run: (editor: any, range: any) => {
      editor
        .chain()
        .focus()
        .deleteRange(range)
        .toggleBulletList()
        .run();
    },
  },
];

export function Editor({ value, onChange }: Props) {
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
  const [slashState, setSlashState] = useState<{
    open: boolean;
    rect: { left: number; top: number } | null;
    range: { from: number; to: number } | null;
    index: number;
  }>({ open: false, rect: null, range: null, index: 0 });
  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  const editor = useEditor({
    extensions: [
      StarterKit.configure({
        heading: { levels: [1, 2, 3] },
      }),
      Placeholder.configure({
        placeholder: "Type '/' for commands, or just start writing…",
      }),
      Image.configure({
        inline: false,
        allowBase64: true,
      }),
    ],
    content: value || "",
    immediatelyRender: false,
    editorProps: {
      attributes: {
        class:
          "prose prose-sm sm:prose lg:prose-lg max-w-none min-h-[400px] focus:outline-none",
      },
      handleKeyDown(_view, event) {
        if (!slashState.open) return false;
        if (event.key === "ArrowDown") {
          event.preventDefault();
          setSlashState((s) => ({
            ...s,
            index: (s.index + 1) % SLASH_COMMANDS.length,
          }));
          return true;
        }
        if (event.key === "ArrowUp") {
          event.preventDefault();
          setSlashState((s) => ({
            ...s,
            index:
              (s.index - 1 + SLASH_COMMANDS.length) % SLASH_COMMANDS.length,
          }));
          return true;
        }
        if (event.key === "Enter") {
          event.preventDefault();
          const cmd = SLASH_COMMANDS[slashState.index];
          if (editor && cmd && slashState.range) {
            cmd.run(editor, slashState.range);
          }
          setSlashState({ open: false, rect: null, range: null, index: 0 });
          return true;
        }
        if (event.key === "Escape") {
          event.preventDefault();
          setSlashState({ open: false, rect: null, range: null, index: 0 });
          return true;
        }
        return false;
      },
    },
    onUpdate({ editor }) {
      onChange(editor.getHTML());
      checkSlashMenu(editor);
    },
    onSelectionUpdate({ editor }) {
      checkSlashMenu(editor);
    },
  });

  const checkSlashMenu = useCallback((ed: any) => {
    if (!ed) return;
    const { state } = ed;
    const { selection } = state;
    const { $from } = selection;
    const parent = $from.parent;

    if (parent.type.name !== "paragraph") {
      setSlashState((s) => (s.open ? { open: false, rect: null, range: null, index: 0 } : s));
      return;
    }

    const text = parent.textContent;
    if (text === "/" || text === "") {
      try {
        const coords = ed.view.coordsAtPos($from.pos);
        setSlashState({
          open: true,
          rect: { left: coords.left, top: coords.bottom + 6 },
          range: { from: $from.pos - text.length, to: $from.pos },
          index: 0,
        });
      } catch {
        setSlashState({ open: false, rect: null, range: null, index: 0 });
      }
    } else {
      setSlashState((s) => (s.open ? { open: false, rect: null, range: null, index: 0 } : s));
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!editor) return;
    // initial check
    checkSlashMenu(editor);
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [editor]);

  // close menu on outside click
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!slashState.open) return;
    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {
        setSlashState({ open: false, rect: null, range: null, index: 0 });
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handler);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handler);
  }, [slashState.open]);

  // Sync external value changes (e.g. document switch) into the editor.
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!editor) return;
    if (value !== editor.getHTML()) {
      editor.commands.setContent(value || "", false);
    }
  }, [value, editor]);

  const handleFileSelect = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file || !editor) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = () => {
      const dataUrl = reader.result;
      if (typeof dataUrl === "string") {
        editor
          .chain()
          .focus()
          .setImage({ src: dataUrl, alt: file.name })
          .run();
      }
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    e.target.value = "";
  };

  if (!editor) {
    return <div className="h-[400px] animate-pulse rounded bg-gray-50" />;
  }

  const tools: Array<{
    icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>;
    label: string;
    run: () => void;
    active: boolean;
  }> = [
    {
      icon: Heading1,
      label: "Heading 1",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 1 }).run(),
      active: editor.isActive("heading", { level: 1 }),
    },
    {
      icon: Heading2,
      label: "Heading 2",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 2 }).run(),
      active: editor.isActive("heading", { level: 2 }),
    },
    {
      icon: Bold,
      label: "Bold",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBold().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("bold"),
    },
    {
      icon: Italic,
      label: "Italic",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleItalic().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("italic"),
    },
    {
      icon: Strikethrough,
      label: "Strike",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleStrike().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("strike"),
    },
    {
      icon: Code,
      label: "Inline code",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleCode().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("code"),
    },
    {
      icon: List,
      label: "Bulleted list",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBulletList().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("bulletList"),
    },
    {
      icon: ListOrdered,
      label: "Numbered list",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleOrderedList().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("orderedList"),
    },
    {
      icon: Quote,
      label: "Quote",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBlockquote().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("blockquote"),
    },
    {
      icon: ImageIcon,
      label: "Insert image",
      run: () => fileInputRef.current?.click(),
      active: false,
    },
  ];

  const selectCommand = (idx: number) => {
    const cmd = SLASH_COMMANDS[idx];
    if (!editor || !cmd || !slashState.range) return;
    cmd.run(editor, slashState.range);
    setSlashState({ open: false, rect: null, range: null, index: 0 });
  };

  return (
    <div className="relative">
      <div className="sticky top-0 z-10 mb-2 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-0.5 rounded-md border border-gray-200 bg-white/80 p-1 backdrop-blur">
        {tools.map((t) => (
          <button
            key={t.label}
            type="button"
            onClick={t.run}
            title={t.label}
            className={cn(
              "rounded p-1.5 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100",
              t.active && "bg-gray-100 text-gray-900"
            )}
          >
            <t.icon className="h-4 w-4" />
          </button>
        ))}
        <input
          ref={fileInputRef}
          type="file"
          accept="image/*"
          className="hidden"
          onChange={handleFileSelect}
        />
      </div>
      <EditorContent editor={editor} />

      {slashState.open && slashState.rect && (
        <div
          ref={menuRef}
          className="fixed z-50 w-64 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-xl"
          style={{
            left: slashState.rect.left,
            top: slashState.rect.top,
          }}
        >
          <div className="border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50 px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500">
            Basic blocks
          </div>
          <ul className="max-h-64 overflow-y-auto py-1">
            {SLASH_COMMANDS.map((cmd, idx) => {
              const Icon = cmd.icon;
              return (
                <li key={cmd.label}>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onMouseEnter={() =>
                      setSlashState((s) => ({ ...s, index: idx }))
                    }
                    onClick={() => selectCommand(idx)}
                    className={cn(
                      "flex w-full items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100",
                      slashState.index === idx && "bg-gray-100 text-gray-900"
                    )}
                  >
                    <span className="flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-600">
                      <Icon className="h-4 w-4" />
                    </span>
                    <span className="flex flex-col">
                      <span className="font-medium">{cmd.label}</span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                        {cmd.description}
                      </span>
                    </span>
                  </button>
                </li>
              );
            })}
          </ul>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

Now let me also think about the position calculation. When text === "/", the cursor is at position $from.pos, and the `/` is at $from.pos - 1. I want to position the menu below the `/`. Let me use $from.pos (the cursor position, which is after the `/`).

But wait, there's an edge case: when the block is empty and contains just `/`, $from.pos might equal $from.pos - 1 (start of block). ```prisma
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
}

model Document {
  id               String     @id @default(uuid())
  title            String     @default("Untitled")
  content          String     @default("")
  isPublished      Boolean    @default(false)
  isArchived       Boolean    @default(false)
  category         String?
  sessionId        String?
  userId           String?
  parentDocumentId String?
  parentDocument   Document?  @relation("DocumentHierarchy", fields: [parentDocumentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  childDocuments   Document[] @relation("DocumentHierarchy")
  createdAt        DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime   @updatedAt

  @@index([parentDocumentId])
  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([userId])
}
```

### File: src/lib/session.ts

I'll add a `getOrCreateUserId()` function:

```ts
const SESSION_KEY = "notion_session_id";
const USER_KEY = "device_user_id";

function generateUUID(): string {
  // ... same as before
}

export function getOrCreateSessionId(): string {
  // ... same as before
}

export function getOrCreateUserId(): string {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return "";
  try {
    let id = window.localStorage.getItem(USER_KEY);
    if (!id) {
      id = generateUUID();
      window.localStorage.setItem(USER_KEY, id);
    }
    return id;
  } catch {
    return generateUUID();
  }
}
```

### File: src/lib/api.ts

Update to use both session and user IDs:

```ts
import { getOrCreateSessionId, getOrCreateUserId } from "./session";

export async function apiFetch(
  input: string,
  init: RequestInit = {}
): Promise<Response> {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  const sessionId = getOrCreateSessionId();
  const userId = getOrCreateUserId();
  if (userId) headers.set("x-user-id", userId);
  if (sessionId) headers.set("x-session-id", sessionId);
  if (init.body && !headers.has("Content-Type")) {
    headers.set("Content-Type", "application/json");
  }
  return fetch(input, { ...init, headers });
}
```

### File: src/app/api/documents/route.ts

```ts
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { prisma } from "../../../lib/prisma";

function getUserId(req: NextRequest): string {
  return req.headers.get("x-user-id") ?? "";
}

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const userId = getUserId(req);
    if (!userId) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing x-user-id header" }, { status: 400 });
    }
    const documents = await prisma.document.findMany({
      where: { userId },
      orderBy: { updatedAt: "desc" },
    });
    return NextResponse.json(documents);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[GET /api/documents]", error);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Failed to fetch documents" }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const userId = getUserId(req);
    if (!userId) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing x-user-id header" }, { status: 400 });
    }
    const body = await req.json();
    const { title, content, parentDocumentId, isPublished, category } = body ?? {};
    const document = await prisma.document.create({
      data: {
        title: typeof title === "string" && title.length > 0 ? title : "Untitled",
        content: typeof content === "string" ? content : "",
        parentDocumentId: typeof parentDocumentId === "string" && parentDocumentId.length > 0 ? parentDocumentId : null,
        isPublished: Boolean(isPublished),
        category: typeof category === "string" && category.length > 0 ? category : null,
        userId,
      },
    });
    return NextResponse.json(document, { status: 201 });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[POST /api/documents]", error);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Failed to create document" }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
```

### File: src/app/api/documents/[id]/route.ts

```ts
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { prisma } from "../../../../lib/prisma";

type Ctx = { params: { id: string } };

function getUserId(req: NextRequest): string {
  return req.headers.get("x-user-id") ?? "";
}

async function findOwnedDoc(id: string, userId: string) {
  if (!userId) return null;
  return prisma.document.findFirst({ where: { id, userId } });
}

export async function GET(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {
  try {
    const userId = getUserId(req);
    const document = await findOwnedDoc(params.id, userId);
    if (!document) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
    return NextResponse.json(document);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[GET /api/documents/:id]", error);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Failed to fetch document" }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {
  try {
    const userId = getUserId(req);
    const existing = await findOwnedDoc(params.id, userId);
    if (!existing) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });

    const body = await req.json();
    const data: Record<string, unknown> = {};
    if (typeof body.title === "string") data.title = body.title;
    if (typeof body.content === "string") data.content = body.content;
    if (typeof body.isPublished === "boolean") data.isPublished = body.isPublished;
    if (typeof body.isArchived === "boolean") data.isArchived = body.isArchived;
    if (body.parentDocumentId !== undefined) {
      data.parentDocumentId = typeof body.parentDocumentId === "string" && body.parentDocumentId.length > 0 ? body.parentDocumentId : null;
    }
    if (body.category !== undefined) {
      data.category = typeof body.category === "string" && body.category.length > 0 ? body.category : null;
    }

    const document = await prisma.document.update({
      where: { id: params.id },
      data,
    });
    return NextResponse.json(document);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[PATCH /api/documents/:id]", error);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Failed to update document" }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {
  try {
    const userId = getUserId(req);
    const existing = await findOwnedDoc(params.id, userId);
    if (!existing) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
    
    // Cascade: Prisma's onDelete: Cascade on the self-relation will
    // automatically delete child documents.
    await prisma.document.delete({ where: { id: params.id } });
    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[DELETE /api/documents/:id]", error);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Failed to delete document" }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
```

### File: src/app/api/documents/import/route.ts

```ts
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { prisma } from "../../../../lib/prisma";

interface IncomingDoc {
  id?: string;
  title?: string;
  content?: string;
  isPublished?: boolean;
  isArchived?: boolean;
  parentDocumentId?: string | null;
  category?: string | null;
  userId?: string; // ignored — always overwritten by header
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id") ?? "";
    if (!userId) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing x-user-id header" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const body = await req.json();
    const incoming: IncomingDoc[] = Array.isArray(body) ? body : Array.isArray(body?.documents) ? body.documents : [];
    if (incoming.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "No documents to import" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    let count = 0;
    const seenIds = new Set<string>();

    for (const raw of incoming) {
      if (!raw || typeof raw !== "object") continue;

      // Strip any incoming userId — we always assign the current user.
      const data = {
        title: typeof raw.title === "string" && raw.title.length > 0 ? raw.title : "Untitled",
        content: typeof raw.content === "string" ? raw.content : "",
        isPublished: Boolean(raw.isPublished),
        isArchived: typeof raw.isArchived === "boolean" ? raw.isArchived : false,
        parentDocumentId: typeof raw.parentDocumentId === "string" && raw.parentDocumentId.length > 0 ? raw.parentDocumentId : null,
        category: typeof raw.category === "string" && raw.category.length > 0 ? raw.category : null,
        userId,
      };

      const id = typeof raw.id === "string" && raw.id.length > 0 ? raw.id : undefined;

      if (data.parentDocumentId) {
        if (!seenIds.has(data.parentDocumentId)) {
          const parent = await prisma.document.findFirst({
            where: { id: data.parentDocumentId, userId },
            select: { id: true },
          });
          if (!parent) {
            data.parentDocumentId = null;
          }
        }
      }

      if (id) {
        const existing = await prisma.document.findFirst({
          where: { id, userId },
          select: { id: true },
        });
        if (existing) {
          await prisma.document.update({ where: { id }, data });
        } else {
          await prisma.document.create({ data: { ...data, id } });
        }
        seenIds.add(id);
      } else {
        const created = await prisma.document.create({ data });
        seenIds.add(created.id);
      }
      count++;
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ count });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[POST /api/documents/import]", error);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Failed to import documents" }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
```

### File: src/components/Editor.tsx

I'll write the full file with the slash menu:

```tsx
"use client";

import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useEditor, EditorContent } from "@tiptap/react";
import StarterKit from "@tiptap/starter-kit";
import Placeholder from "@tiptap/extension-placeholder";
import Image from "@tiptap/extension-image";
import {
  Bold,
  Code,
  Heading1,
  Heading2,
  Image as ImageIcon,
  Italic,
  List,
  ListOrdered,
  Quote,
  Strikethrough,
} from "lucide-react";
import { cn } from "../lib/utils";

interface Props {
  value: string;
  onChange: (html: string) => void;
}

type SlashRange = { from: number; to: number };

interface SlashCommand {
  label: string;
  description: string;
  icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>;
  run: (editor: any, range: SlashRange) => void;
}

const SLASH_COMMANDS: SlashCommand[] = [
  {
    label: "Heading 1",
    description: "Large section heading",
    icon: Heading1,
    run: (editor, range) => {
      editor.chain().focus().deleteRange(range).setNode("heading", { level: 1 }).run();
    },
  },
  {
    label: "Heading 2",
    description: "Medium section heading",
    icon: Heading2,
    run: (editor, range) => {
      editor.chain().focus().deleteRange(range).setNode("heading", { level: 2 }).run();
    },
  },
  {
    label: "Bullet List",
    description: "Simple bulleted list",
    icon: List,
    run: (editor, range) => {
      editor.chain().focus().deleteRange(range).toggleBulletList().run();
    },
  },
];

export function Editor({ value, onChange }: Props) {
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const [slash, setSlash] = useState<{
    open: boolean;
    left: number;
    top: number;
    range: SlashRange | null;
    index: number;
  }>({ open: false, left: 0, top: 0, range: null, index: 0 });

  const closeSlash = useCallback(() => {
    setSlash((s) => (s.open ? { open: false, left: 0, top: 0, range: null, index: 0 } : s));
  }, []);

  const editor = useEditor({
    extensions: [
      StarterKit.configure({ heading: { levels: [1, 2, 3] } }),
      Placeholder.configure({
        placeholder: "Type '/' for commands, or just start writing…",
      }),
      Image.configure({ inline: false, allowBase64: true }),
    ],
    content: value || "",
    immediatelyRender: false,
    editorProps: {
      attributes: {
        class: "prose prose-sm sm:prose lg:prose-lg max-w-none min-h-[400px] focus:outline-none",
      },
      handleKeyDown(_view, event) {
        if (!slash.open) return false;
        if (event.key === "ArrowDown") {
          event.preventDefault();
          setSlash((s) => ({ ...s, index: (s.index + 1) % SLASH_COMMANDS.length }));
          return true;
        }
        if (event.key === "ArrowUp") {
          event.preventDefault();
          setSlash((s) => ({
            ...s,
            index: (s.index - 1 + SLASH_COMMANDS.length) % SLASH_COMMANDS.length,
          }));
          return true;
        }
        if (event.key === "Enter") {
          event.preventDefault();
          const cmd = SLASH_COMMANDS[slash.index];
          if (editor && cmd && slash.range) cmd.run(editor, slash.range);
          closeSlash();
          return true;
        }
        if (event.key === "Escape") {
          event.preventDefault();
          closeSlash();
          return true;
        }
        return false;
      },
    },
    onUpdate({ editor }) {
      onChange(editor.getHTML());
      detectSlash(editor);
    },
    onSelectionUpdate({ editor }) {
      detectSlash(editor);
    },
  });

  const detectSlash = useCallback((ed: any) => {
    if (!ed) return;
    const { state } = ed;
    const { selection } = state;
    const { $from } = selection;
    const parent = $from.parent;

    if (parent.type.name !== "paragraph" || parent.textContent !== "/") {
      closeSlash();
      return;
    }

    try {
      const coords = ed.view.coordsAtPos($from.pos);
      setSlash({
        open: true,
        left: coords.left,
        top: coords.bottom + 6,
        range: { from: $from.pos - 1, to: $from.pos },
        index: 0,
      });
    } catch {
      closeSlash();
    }
  }, [closeSlash]);

  // Initial detection once the editor mounts.
  useEffect(() => {
    if (editor) detectSlash(editor);
  }, [editor, detectSlash]);

  // Close on outside click.
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!slash.open) return;
    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {
        closeSlash();
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handler);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handler);
  }, [slash.open, closeSlash]);

  // Sync external value changes into the editor.
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!editor) return;
    if (value !== editor.getHTML()) {
      editor.commands.setContent(value || "", false);
    }
  }, [value, editor]);

  const handleFileSelect = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file || !editor) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = () => {
      const dataUrl = reader.result;
      if (typeof dataUrl === "string") {
        editor.chain().focus().setImage({ src: dataUrl, alt: file.name }).run();
      }
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    e.target.value = "";
  };

  if (!editor) {
    return <div className="h-[400px] animate-pulse rounded bg-gray-50" />;
  }

  const tools: Array<{
    icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>;
    label: string;
    run: () => void;
    active: boolean;
  }> = [
    {
      icon: Heading1,
      label: "Heading 1",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 1 }).run(),
      active: editor.isActive("heading", { level: 1 }),
    },
    {
      icon: Heading2,
      label: "Heading 2",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 2 }).run(),
      active: editor.isActive("heading", { level: 2 }),
    },
    {
      icon: Bold,
      label: "Bold",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBold().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("bold"),
    },
    {
      icon: Italic,
      label: "Italic",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleItalic().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("italic"),
    },
    {
      icon: Strikethrough,
      label: "Strike",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleStrike().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("strike"),
    },
    {
      icon: Code,
      label: "Inline code",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleCode().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("code"),
    },
    {
      icon: List,
      label: "Bulleted list",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBulletList().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("bulletList"),
    },
    {
      icon: ListOrdered,
      label: "Numbered list",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleOrderedList().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("orderedList"),
    },
    {
      icon: Quote,
      label: "Quote",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBlockquote().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("blockquote"),
    },
    {
      icon: ImageIcon,
      label: "Insert image",
      run: () => fileInputRef.current?.click(),
      active: false,
    },
  ];

  const selectCommand = (idx: number) => {
    const cmd = SLASH_COMMANDS[idx];
    if (!editor || !cmd || !slash.range) return;
    cmd.run(editor, slash.range);
    closeSlash();
  };

  return (
    <div className="relative">
      <div className="sticky top-0 z-10 mb-2 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-0.5 rounded-md border border-gray-200 bg-white/80 p-1 backdrop-blur">
        {tools.map((t) => (
          <button
            key={t.label}
            type="button"
            onClick={t.run}
            title={t.label}
            className={cn(
              "rounded p-1.5 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100",
              t.active && "bg-gray-100 text-gray-900"
            )}
          >
            <t.icon className="h-4 w-4" />
          </button>
        ))}
        <input
          ref={fileInputRef}
          type="file"
          accept="image/*"
          className="hidden"
          onChange={handleFileSelect}
        />
      </div>
      <EditorContent editor={editor} />

      {slash.open && (
        <div
          ref={menuRef}
          className="fixed z-50 w-64 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-xl"
          style={{ left: slash.left, top: slash.top }}
        >
          <div className="border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50 px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500">
            Basic blocks
          </div>
          <ul className="max-h-64 overflow-y-auto py-1">
            {SLASH_COMMANDS.map((cmd, idx) => {
              const Icon = cmd.icon;
              return (
                <li key={cmd.label}>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onMouseEnter={() => setSlash((s) => ({ ...s, index: idx }))}
                    onClick={() => selectCommand(idx)}
                    className={cn(
                      "flex w-full items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100",
                      slash.index === idx && "bg-gray-100 text-gray-900"
                    )}
                  >
                    <span className="flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-600">
                      <Icon className="h-4 w-4" />
                    </span>
                    <span className="flex flex-col">
                      <span className="font-medium">{cmd.label}</span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">{cmd.description}</span>
                    </span>
                  </button>
                </li>
              );
            })}
          </ul>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

OK let me also double-check the slash menu UX:
- When text is exactly "/", menu opens
- When user types another char (e.g., "/h"), text is "/h" ≠ "/" so menu closes
- When user presses Backspace, text becomes "" ≠ "/" so menu closes
- When user presses ArrowDown, index cycles
- When user presses Enter, command runs
- When user clicks outside, menu closes
- When user clicks a menu item, command runs

```tsx
"use client";

import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useEditor, EditorContent } from "@tiptap/react";
import StarterKit from "@tiptap/starter-kit";
import Placeholder from "@tiptap/extension-placeholder";
import Image from "@tiptap/extension-image";
import {
  Bold, Code, Heading1, Heading2, Image as ImageIcon,
  Italic, List, ListOrdered, Quote, Strikethrough,
} from "lucide-react";
import { cn } from "../lib/utils";

interface Props {
  value: string;
  onChange: (html: string) => void;
}

interface SlashRange { from: number; to: number; }

interface SlashCommand {
  label: string;
  description: string;
  icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>;
  run: (editor: any, range: SlashRange) => void;
}

const SLASH_COMMANDS: SlashCommand[] = [
  {
    label: "Heading 1",
    description: "Large section heading",
    icon: Heading1,
    run: (editor, range) => {
      editor.chain().focus().deleteRange(range).setNode("heading", { level: 1 }).run();
    },
  },
  {
    label: "Heading 2",
    description: "Medium section heading",
    icon: Heading2,
    run: (editor, range) => {
      editor.chain().focus().deleteRange(range).setNode("heading", { level: 2 }).run();
    },
  },
  {
    label: "Bullet List",
    description: "Simple bulleted list",
    icon: List,
    run: (editor, range) => {
      editor.chain().focus().deleteRange(range).toggleBulletList().run();
    },
  },
];

export function Editor({ value, onChange }: Props) {
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  // Mirror of `slash` so the Tiptap keydown handler (whose closure
  // we can't always trust to see the latest React state) reads
  // the current values.
  const slashRef = useRef({
    open: false,
    left: 0,
    top: 0,
    range: null as SlashRange | null,
    index: 0,
  });
  const [slash, setSlash] = useState(slashRef.current);
  slashRef.current = slash;

  const closeSlash = useCallback(() => {
    setSlash((s) =>
      s.open ? { open: false, left: 0, top: 0, range: null, index: 0 } : s
    );
  }, []);

  const editor = useEditor({
    extensions: [
      StarterKit.configure({ heading: { levels: [1, 2, 3] } }),
      Placeholder.configure({
        placeholder: "Type '/' for commands, or just start writing…",
      }),
      Image.configure({ inline: false, allowBase64: true }),
    ],
    content: value || "",
    immediatelyRender: false,
    editorProps: {
      attributes: {
        class:
          "prose prose-sm sm:prose lg:prose-lg max-w-none min-h-[400px] focus:outline-none",
      },
      handleKeyDown(_view, event) {
        const current = slashRef.current;
        if (!current.open) return false;
        if (event.key === "ArrowDown") {
          event.preventDefault();
          setSlash((s) => ({
            ...s,
            index: (s.index + 1) % SLASH_COMMANDS.length,
          }));
          return true;
        }
        if (event.key === "ArrowUp") {
          event.preventDefault();
          setSlash((s) => ({
            ...s,
            index:
              (s.index - 1 + SLASH_COMMANDS.length) % SLASH_COMMANDS.length,
          }));
          return true;
        }
        if (event.key === "Enter") {
          event.preventDefault();
          const cmd = SLASH_COMMANDS[current.index];
          if (editor && cmd && current.range) cmd.run(editor, current.range);
          closeSlash();
          return true;
        }
        if (event.key === "Escape") {
          event.preventDefault();
          closeSlash();
          return true;
        }
        return false;
      },
    },
    onUpdate({ editor }) {
      onChange(editor.getHTML());
      detectSlash(editor);
    },
    onSelectionUpdate({ editor }) {
      detectSlash(editor);
    },
  });

  const detectSlash = useCallback(
    (ed: any) => {
      if (!ed) return;
      const { state } = ed;
      const { selection } = state;
      const { $from } = selection;
      const parent = $from.parent;

      // Only show when the current block is an empty paragraph
      // whose only content is the "/" character. This matches
      // the spec: "appears ONLY when the user types / on an
      // empty text block".
      if (parent.type.name !== "paragraph" || parent.textContent !== "/") {
        closeSlash();
        return;
      }

      try {
        const coords = ed.view.coordsAtPos($from.pos);
        setSlash({
          open: true,
          left: coords.left,
          top: coords.bottom + 6,
          range: { from: $from.pos - 1, to: $from.pos },
          index: 0,
        });
      } catch {
        closeSlash();
      }
    },
    [closeSlash]
  );

  // Initial detect after the editor mounts.
  useEffect(() => {
    if (editor) detectSlash(editor);
  }, [editor, detectSlash]);

  // Close on outside click.
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!slash.open) return;
    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {
        closeSlash();
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handler);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handler);
  }, [slash.open, closeSlash]);

  // Sync external value changes (e.g. document switch) into the editor.
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!editor) return;
    if (value !== editor.getHTML()) {
      editor.commands.setContent(value || "", false);
    }
  }, [value, editor]);

  const handleFileSelect = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file || !editor) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = () => {
      const dataUrl = reader.result;
      if (typeof dataUrl === "string") {
        editor.chain().focus().setImage({ src: dataUrl, alt: file.name }).run();
      }
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    e.target.value = "";
  };

  if (!editor) {
    return <div className="h-[400px] animate-pulse rounded bg-gray-50" />;
  }

  const tools: Array<{
    icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>;
    label: string;
    run: () => void;
    active: boolean;
  }> = [
    {
      icon: Heading1,
      label: "Heading 1",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 1 }).run(),
      active: editor.isActive("heading", { level: 1 }),
    },
    {
      icon: Heading2,
      label: "Heading 2",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 2 }).run(),
      active: editor.isActive("heading", { level: 2 }),
    },
    {
      icon: Bold,
      label: "Bold",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBold().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("bold"),
    },
    {
      icon: Italic,
      label: "Italic",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleItalic().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("italic"),
    },
    {
      icon: Strikethrough,
      label: "Strike",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleStrike().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("strike"),
    },
    {
      icon: Code,
      label: "Inline code",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleCode().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("code"),
    },
    {
      icon: List,
      label: "Bulleted list",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBulletList().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("bulletList"),
    },
    {
      icon: ListOrdered,
      label: "Numbered list",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleOrderedList().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("orderedList"),
    },
    {
      icon: Quote,
      label: "Quote",
      run: () => editor.chain().focus().toggleBlockquote().run(),
      active: editor.isActive("blockquote"),
    },
    {
      icon: ImageIcon,
      label: "Insert image",
      run: () => fileInputRef.current?.click(),
      active: false,
    },
  ];

  const selectCommand = (idx: number) => {
    const cmd = SLASH_COMMANDS[idx];
    if (!editor || !cmd || !slash.range) return;
    cmd.run(editor, slash.range);
    closeSlash();
  };

  return (
    <div className="relative">
      <div className="sticky top-0 z-10 mb-2 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-0.5 rounded-md border border-gray-200 bg-white/80 p-1 backdrop-blur">
        {tools.map((t) => (
          <button
            key={t.label}
            type="button"
            onClick={t.run}
            title={t.label}
            className={cn(
              "rounded p-1.5 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100",
              t.active && "bg-gray-100 text-gray-900"
            )}
          >
            <t.icon className="h-4 w-4" />
          </button>
        ))}
        <input
          ref={fileInputRef}
          type="file"
          accept="image/*"
          className="hidden"
          onChange={handleFileSelect}
        />
      </div>
      <EditorContent editor={editor} />

      {slash.open && (
        <div
          ref={menuRef}
          className="fixed z-50 w-64 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-xl"
          style={{ left: slash.left, top: slash.top }}
        >
          <div className="border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50 px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500">
            Basic blocks
          </div>
          <ul className="max-h-64 overflow-y-auto py-1">
            {SLASH_COMMANDS.map((cmd, idx) => {
              const Icon = cmd.icon;
              return (
                <li key={cmd.label}>
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onMouseEnter={() => setSlash((s) => ({ ...s, index: idx }))}
                    onClick={() => selectCommand(idx)}
                    className={cn(
                      "flex w-full items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100",
                      slash.index === idx && "bg-gray-100 text-gray-900"
                    )}
                  >
                    <span className="flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-600">
                      <Icon className="h-4 w-4" />
                    </span>
                    <span className="flex flex-col">
                      <span className="font-medium">{cmd.label}</span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                        {cmd.description}
                      </span>
                    </span>
                  </button>
                </li>
              );
            })}
          </ul>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

```ts
export async function importBackup(file: File): Promise<number> {
  const text = await file.text();
  const data = JSON.parse(text);
  const documents: Document[] = Array.isArray(data) ? data : Array.isArray(data?.documents) ? data.documents : [];
  // ...
  const res = await apiFetch("/api/documents/import", {
    method: "POST",
    body: JSON.stringify({ documents }),
  });
  // ...
}
```

### prisma/schema.prisma

```prisma
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
}

model Document {
  id               String     @id @default(uuid())
  title            String     @default("Untitled")
  content          String     @default("")
  isPublished      Boolean    @default(false)
  isArchived       Boolean    @default(false)
  category         String?
  sessionId        String?
  userId           String?
  parentDocumentId String?
  parentDocument   Document?  @relation("DocumentHierarchy", fields: [parentDocumentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  childDocuments   Document[] @relation("DocumentHierarchy")
  createdAt        DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime   @updatedAt

  @@index([parentDocumentId])
  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([userId])
}
```

### src/lib/session.ts

```ts
const SESSION_KEY = "notion_session_id";
const USER_KEY = "device_user_id";

/**
 * Generates a v4 UUID. Uses crypto.randomUUID when available,
 * falls back to a Math.random-based generator for older runtimes.
 */
function generateUUID(): string {
  if (typeof crypto !== "undefined" && typeof crypto.randomUUID === "function") {
    return crypto.randomUUID();
  }
  return "xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx".replace(/[xy]/g, (c) => {
    const r = (Math.random() * 16) | 0;
    const v = c === "x" ? r : (r & 0x3) | 0x8;
    return v.toString(16);
  });
}

/**
 * Returns a stable, anonymous identifier for the current browser.
 * The ID is created on first call and persisted to localStorage.
 * On the server (no window) it returns an empty string.
 */
export function getOrCreateSessionId(): string {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return "";
  try {
    let id = window.localStorage.getItem(SESSION_KEY);
    if (!id) {
      id = generateUUID();
      window.localStorage.setItem(SESSION_KEY, id);
    }
    return id;
  } catch {
    return generateUUID();
  }
}

/**
 * Returns the per-device user id used for data isolation. Stored
 * under the localStorage key `device_user_id`, generated on first
 * access. This is what every API request uses as `x-user-id`.
 */
export function getOrCreateUserId(): string {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return "";
  try {
    let id = window.localStorage.getItem(USER_KEY);
    if (!id) {
      id = generateUUID();
      window.localStorage.setItem(USER_KEY, id);
    }
    return id;
  } catch {
    // localStorage may be disabled (private mode). Fall back to
    // an in-memory id for this page load only.
    return generateUUID();
  }
}
```

  id: string;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  isPublished: boolean;
  isArchived: boolean;
  category: string | null;
  parentDocumentId: string | null;
  userId?: string;
  sessionId?: string;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}

export interface DocumentNode extends Document {
  children: DocumentNode[];
}

### src/lib/api.ts

```ts
import { getOrCreateSessionId, getOrCreateUserId } from "./session";

/**
 * Thin wrapper around `fetch` that attaches both the legacy
 * `x-session-id` and the new `x-user-id` headers to every request.
 * The `x-user-id` is the primary key used by the API to scope
 * documents to a single browser/device.
 */
export async function apiFetch(
  input: string,
  init: RequestInit = {}
): Promise<Response> {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  const userId = getOrCreateUserId();
  if (userId) headers.set("x-user-id", userId);
  const sessionId = getOrCreateSessionId();
  if (sessionId) headers.set("x-session-id", sessionId);
  if (init.body && !headers.has("Content-Type")) {
    headers.set("Content-Type", "application/json");
  }
  return fetch(input, { ...init, headers });
}
```

### src/app/api/documents/route.ts

```ts
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { prisma } from "../../../lib/prisma";

function getUserId(req: NextRequest): string {
  return req.headers.get("x-user-id") ?? "";
}

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const userId = getUserId(req);
    if (!userId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Missing x-user-id header" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const documents = await prisma.document.findMany({
      where: { userId },
      orderBy: { updatedAt: "desc" },
    });

    return NextResponse.json(documents);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[GET /api/documents]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to fetch documents" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const userId = getUserId(req);
    if (!userId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Missing x-user-id header" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const body = await req.json();
    const { title, content, parentDocumentId, isPublished, category } =
      body ?? {};

    const document = await prisma.document.create({
      data: {
        title:
          typeof title === "string" && title.length > 0 ? title : "Untitled",
        content: typeof content === "string" ? content : "",
        parentDocumentId:
          typeof parentDocumentId === "string" &&
          parentDocumentId.length > 0
            ? parentDocumentId
            : null,
        isPublished: Boolean(isPublished),
        category:
          typeof category === "string" && category.length > 0
            ? category
            : null,
        userId,
      },
    });

    return NextResponse.json(document, { status: 201 });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[POST /api/documents]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to create document" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}
```

### src/app/api/documents/[id]/route.ts

```ts
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { prisma } from "../../../../lib/prisma";

type Ctx = { params: { id: string } };

function getUserId(req: NextRequest): string {
  return req.headers.get("x-user-id") ?? "";
}

async function findOwnedDoc(id: string, userId: string) {
  if (!userId) return null;
  return prisma.document.findFirst({ where: { id, userId } });
}

export async function GET(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {
  try {
    const userId = getUserId(req);
    const document = await findOwnedDoc(params.id, userId);
    if (!document) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
    }
    return NextResponse.json(document);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[GET /api/documents/:id]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to fetch document" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {
  try {
    const userId = getUserId(req);
    const existing = await findOwnedDoc(params.id, userId);
    if (!existing) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
    }

    const body = await req.json();
    const data: Record<string, unknown> = {};

    if (typeof body.title === "string") data.title = body.title;
    if (typeof body.content === "string") data.content = body.content;
    if (typeof body.isPublished === "boolean")
      data.isPublished = body.isPublished;
    if (typeof body.isArchived === "boolean")
      data.isArchived = body.isArchived;
    if (body.parentDocumentId !== undefined) {
      data.parentDocumentId =
        typeof body.parentDocumentId === "string" &&
        body.parentDocumentId.length > 0
          ? body.parentDocumentId
          : null;
    }
    if (body.category !== undefined) {
      data.category =
        typeof body.category === "string" && body.category.length > 0
          ? body.category
          : null;
    }

    const document = await prisma.document.update({
      where: { id: params.id },
      data,
    });

    return NextResponse.json(document);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[PATCH /api/documents/:id]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to update document" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {
  try {
    const userId = getUserId(req);
    const existing = await findOwnedDoc(params.id, userId);
    if (!existing) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
    }

    // Cascade: the self-relation in schema.prisma has
    // `onDelete: Cascade`, so child documents are removed
    // automatically by the database.
    await prisma.document.delete({
      where: { id: params.id },
    });
    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[DELETE /api/documents/:id]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to delete document" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}
```

### src/app/api/documents/import/route.ts

```ts
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { prisma } from "../../../../lib/prisma";

interface IncomingDoc {
  id?: string;
  title?: string;
  content?: string;
  isPublished?: boolean;
  isArchived?: boolean;
  parentDocumentId?: string | null;
  category?: string | null;
  // Incoming userId is intentionally ignored — the API always
  // assigns the current caller as the owner.
  userId?: string;
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id") ?? "";
    if (!userId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Missing x-user-id header" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const body = await req.json();
    const incoming: IncomingDoc[] = Array.isArray(body)
      ? body
      : Array.isArray(body?.documents)
        ? body.documents
        : [];

    if (incoming.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "No documents to import" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    let count = 0;
    const seenIds = new Set<string>();

    for (const raw of incoming) {
      if (!raw || typeof raw !== "object") continue;

      // Strip any incoming userId — we always assign the current
      // caller's id, so a user can't import their way into
      // somebody else's data.
      const data = {
        title:
          typeof raw.title === "string" && raw.title.length > 0
            ? raw.title
            : "Untitled",
        content: typeof raw.content === "string" ? raw.content : "",
        isPublished: Boolean(raw.isPublished),
        isArchived: typeof raw.isArchived === "boolean" ? raw.isArchived : false,
        parentDocumentId:
          typeof raw.parentDocumentId === "string" &&
          raw.parentDocumentId.length > 0
            ? raw.parentDocumentId
            : null,
        category:
          typeof raw.category === "string" && raw.category.length > 0
            ? raw.category
            : null,
        userId,
      };

      const id =
        typeof raw.id === "string" && raw.id.length > 0 ? raw.id : undefined;

      if (data.parentDocumentId) {
        if (!seenIds.has(data.parentDocumentId)) {
          const parent = await prisma.document.findFirst({
            where: { id: data.parentDocumentId, userId },
            select: { id: true },
          });
          if (!parent) {
            data.parentDocumentId = null;
          }
        }
      }

      if (id) {
        const existing = await prisma.document.findFirst({
          where: { id, userId },
          select: { id: true },
        });
        if (existing) {
          await prisma.document.update({ where: { id }, data });
        } else {
          await prisma.document.create({ data: { ...data, id } });
        }
        seenIds.add(id);
      } else {
        const created = await prisma.document.create({ data });
        seenIds.add(created.id);
      }
      count++;
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ count });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("[POST /api/documents/import]", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to import documents" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}
```

### src/components/Sidebar.tsx

I'll keep this file the same except convert `@/` to relative. No functional changes since `api.ts` handles the userId header automatically.

```tsx
"use client";

import { useRef } from "react";
import {
  ChevronLeft,
  ChevronRight,
  Download,
  FileText,
  Plus,
  Search,
  Upload,
} from "lucide-react";
import { DocumentTree } from "./DocumentTree";
import type { Document } from "../lib/types";
import { cn } from "../lib/utils";
import { exportBackup, importBackup } from "../lib/backup";

interface Props {
  documents: Document[];
  selectedId: string | null;
  onSelect: (id: string) => void;
  onCreate: (parentId: string | null) => void;
  isOpen: boolean;
  onToggle: () => void;
  onChanged: () => void;
}

export function Sidebar({
  documents,
  selectedId,
  onSelect,
  onCreate,
  isOpen,
  onToggle,
  onChanged,
}: Props) {
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);

  const handleExport = async () => {
    try {
      await exportBackup();
    } catch (err) {
      console.error(err);
      alert("Failed to export backup.");
    }
  };

  const handleImportClick = () => {
    fileInputRef.current?.click();
  };

  const handleFileChange = async (
    e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>
  ) => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file) return;
    try {
      const count = await importBackup(file);
      onChanged();
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("documents:changed"));
      alert(`Imported ${count} page${count === 1 ? "" : "s"}.`);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error(err);
      alert(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to import backup.");
    } finally {
      e.target.value = "";
    }
  };

  return (
    <aside
      className={cn(
        "flex h-full shrink-0 flex-col border-r border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 transition-[width] duration-200",
        isOpen ? "w-72" : "w-12"
      )}
    >
      <div className="flex h-12 items-center gap-1 border-b border-gray-200 px-2">
        {isOpen && (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-1 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">
            <FileText className="h-4 w-4" />
            <span>My Workspace</span>
          </div>
        )}
        <button
          onClick={onToggle}
          className={cn(
            "rounded p-1.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200",
            isOpen ? "ml-auto" : "mx-auto"
          )}
          aria-label="Toggle sidebar"
          title="Toggle sidebar"
        >
          {isOpen ? (
            <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
          ) : (
            <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4" />
          )}
        </button>
      </div>

      {isOpen && (
        <>
          <div className="space-y-1 p-2">
            <button
              onClick={() => onCreate(null)}
              className="flex w-full items-center gap-2 rounded px-2 py-1.5 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200"
            >
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
              <span>New page</span>
            </button>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded px-2 py-1.5 text-sm text-gray-500">
              <Search className="h-4 w-4" />
              <span>Search</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="px-2 pb-1 pt-1 text-[11px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">
            Pages
          </div>
          <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-1 pb-2">
            <DocumentTree
              documents={documents}
              selectedId={selectedId}
              onSelect={onSelect}
              onCreate={onCreate}
            />
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-1 border-t border-gray-200 p-2">
            <button
              onClick={handleExport}
              className="flex w-full items-center gap-2 rounded px-2 py-1.5 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200"
              title="Download a JSON backup of all your pages"
            >
              <Download className="h-4 w-4" />
              <span>Export backup</span>
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={handleImportClick}
              className="flex w-full items-center gap-2 rounded px-2 py-1.5 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200"
              title="Import a previously exported JSON backup"
            >
              <Upload className="h-4 w-4" />
              <span>Import backup</span>
            </button>
            <input
              ref={fileInputRef}
              type="file"
              accept="application/json,.json"
              className="hidden"
              onChange={handleFileChange}
            />
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </aside>
  );
}
```

generator client {

}

datasource db {

}

model Document {
  id               String     @id @default(uuid())

  isPublished      Boolean    @default(false)
  isArchived       Boolean    @default(false)

  sessionId        String?
  userId           String?
  parentDocumentId String?
  parentDocument   Document?  @relation("DocumentHierarchy", fields: [parentDocumentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  childDocuments   Document[] @relation("DocumentHierarchy")
  createdAt        DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime   @updatedAt

  @@index([parentDocumentId])
  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([userId])
}

prisma/schema.prisma
```
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
}

model Document {
  id               String     @id @default(uuid())
  title            String     @default("Untitled")
  content          String     @default("")
  isPublished      Boolean    @default(false)
  isArchived       Boolean    @default(false)
  category         String?
  sessionId        String?
  userId           String?
  parentDocumentId String?
  parentDocument   Document?  @relation("DocumentHierarchy", fields: [parentDocumentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  childDocuments   Document[] @relation("DocumentHierarchy")
  createdAt        DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime   @updatedAt

  @@index([parentDocumentId])
  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([userId])
}

src/lib/session.ts
```
const SESSION_KEY = "notion_session_id";
const USER_KEY = "device_user_id";

/**
 * Generates a v4 UUID. Uses crypto.randomUUID when available,
 * falls back to a Math.random-based generator for older runtimes.
 */
function generateUUID(): string {
  if (typeof crypto !== "undefined" && typeof crypto.randomUUID === "function") {
    return crypto.randomUUID();
  }
  return "xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx".replace(/[xy]/g, (c) => {
    const r = (Math.random() * 16) | 0;
    const v = c === "x" ? r : (r & 0x3) | 0x8;
    return v.toString(16);
  });
}

/**
 * Returns a stable, anonymous identifier for the current browser.
 * The ID is created on first call and persisted to localStorage.
 * On the server (no window) it returns an empty string.
 */
export function getOrCreateSessionId(): string {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return "";
  try {
    let id = window.localStorage.getItem(SESSION_KEY);
    if (!id) {
      id = generateUUID();
      window.localStorage.setItem(SESSION_KEY, id);
    }
    return id;
  } catch {
    // localStorage may be disabled (e.g. private mode). Fall back
    // to an in-memory ID for this page load only.
    return generateUUID();
  }
}

/**
 * Returns the per-device user id used for data isolation. Stored
 * under the localStorage key `device_user_id`, generated on first
 * access. This is what every API request uses as `x-user-id`.
 */
export function getOrCreateUserId(): string {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") return "";
  try {
    let id = window.localStorage.getItem(USER_KEY);
    if (!id) {
      id = generateUUID();
      window.localStorage.setItem(USER_KEY, id);
    }
    return id;
  } catch {
    // localStorage may be disabled (private mode). Fall back to
    // an in-memory id for this page load only.
    return generateUUID();
  }
}
```

  title: string;

  isPublished: boolean;
